Name: Nuits Noires
Description:
Nuits Noires, créateurs d'immersions sonores, nous nous adressons aux acteurs de la culture, du patrimoine et des marques en quête de sensible pour leurs publics.

Notre mission est de transmettre vos savoirs par l'excellence du média sonore et immersif en alliant l'accessibilité des contenus à toutes et tous. 

Nous racontons des histoires sonores par la narration écrite et par le sound design afin d’embarquer les publics dans des environnements sonores, sensibles, subtils et intemporels.

Notre force est notre direction artistique singulière et nous accompagnons nos clients de l’élaboration de dispositifs immersifs, la conception sonore, l’écriture, la production, la réalisation jusqu’au conseil en diffusion et intégration spatialisée que ce soit pour des projets numériques ou in situ.

Nous collaborons sur des projets de médiation, muséographie, valorisation du patrimoine, communication et divertissement comme par exemple avec le musée du Louvre, le département de la Manche, le musée de l’Air et de l’Espace, la Seine Musicale, le musée Albert Kahn, La Cité des Sciences et de l’Industrie, la Ville de Villeurbanne et le Rize, Paris Musées, le musée du quai Branly, le muséum National d’Histoire Naturelle, le Ministère de la Culture, Palais de Tokyo, le Centre Pompidou par exemple.

Nous avons aussi, auto-produit deux séries immersives audio dont :
Ferme les yeux et regarde, des immersions sonores au coeur d’oeuvres d’art et vous devez deviner dans quelle oeuvre vous êtes. Beaux arts magazine, Télérama, Nouvel Obs, Radio Canada, Connaissance des arts, Focus Belgique ont parlé de notre podcast. Grâce à cette création nous avons été finalistes au Numix
Québec en 2022.

Nous sommes lauréats de plusieurs délégations du Ministère de la Culture en Belgique, Pays Bas, Canada, Maroc. Nous avons remporté le prix d’Or Innovation pour projet avec Salomon; lauréats des Duos de l’Innovation du Muséum connections, lauréats du concours Sitem et la Bourse FrenchTech.

Name: Miloco Studios
Description: 40 years of studios, passion and talent.

Name: Invite Only Studios
Description:
Invite Only Studios is an experiential recording, photography studio and event space located in the heart of New York City. Our multi-million dollar, state-of-the-art facility has been in operation since October 2019 and has quickly become a creative hub for some of the industry's top talent and brands.

We’ve proudly hosted clients such as Nicki Minaj, Mary J. Blige, Snoop Dogg, Burna Boy, Imagine Dragons, Alicia Keys, Travis Scott and Peso Pluma, to name a few. 

Additionally, we've hosted events for companies such as ESPN, Madison Square Garden and Universal Music Group. Our team has also developed musical content for major brands including Starbucks, JP Morgan Chase, Sunny D, Summer’s Eve, Wendy’s, and Weight Watchers.

Our versatile space is available for a wide range of events, including: Corporate and Industry Gatherings (networking events, mixers, etc.), Pop-ups, Art Exhibits, Release Parties (Album, EP, etc.), Ticketed Shows & Events (Comedy Shows, Conferences, etc.), Keynote Speeches and Holiday celebrations.

Amenities in the facility include a fully-operational Bar, Kitchenette, PA system, VIP room, Video Projectors (3), and abundant natural light—all just steps from major transportation.

The studios are outfitted with a 48-channel SSL Duality console and a Z3 Triple Steven Slate Raven desk—the only one of its kind in the world. With top-tier production software and hardware, we offer full audio capabilities, including stereo and 5.1 mixing. Our team of engineers and creatives has worked with artists, filmmakers, broadcast networks, and global brands to deliver premium production and post-production services.

Get Invited!

Description: We turn up the craft. We’re sound engineers, music composers and audio producers passionate about the emotional power of sound. We create with you, for you. Apparently, we’re pretty fun to work with too.

Name: Sheer Publishing Africa
Description: Sheer Publishing Africa is the largest independent music publisher in Africa. Established in 1996, Sheer represents the largest collection of African library music works ranging from traditional to contemporary sounds. We represent premier songwriters and composers whose works are utilized in major commercial campaigns, radio, film and television. Our professional team provide music supervision services to a wide array of major productions in South Africa and the continent. The business is also entrusted with  copyright management for major labels operating in Africa. Sheer Publishing Africa offers global publishing administration, distribution, monetisation and creative and sync services for clients across the continent. It is a subsidiary of Downtown Music Services - a modern global company with over 20 million music assets from countries across six continents.

Name: The Sound of Egypt
Description:
The Sound of Egypt is a collective of media enthusiasts driven by the power of impactful communication. Our unity has established one of Egypt's most reputable Audio production agencies & Training Academies.

With over 20 years of field experience, we aim to pioneer in Audio Production, shaping the future of storytelling and brand communication through audio in Egypt.

Name: Pressure Cooker Studios
Description:
We are a full-service Music and Audio Studio.

We create the sound for ‘that thing’ you need. We’re the first and last stop for everything you hear.

We work across all media; Commercials, Gaming, Narrative and have an extensive selection of original (and customisable) Library Music under our Pressure Music Library resource.

Take a look at some of our work on our website.

We think about a project’s entire audio journey holistically, with your creative vision as the cornerstone for every decision we make along the process.

We always find a way to make it happen. Our passion and experience has put us in this position.

We believe the best way to innovate is to grow our talent.

We are always learning from each other and want to grow the talent in our industry, forming a community to set a new standard with every project we touch.

Let’s collaborate, so we can elevate your art / film / game / brand together

We specialize in original music, music supervision, licensing, sound design, recording, sonic branding, and audio post-production, leveraging AI and cutting-edge technology to deliver innovative sound solutions.

DIgital Record Label & Music production
Song Writing - Arrangement - Remix - FilmScoring -Jingle's,etc

Name: Polyvinyl Record Co.
Description:
Polyvinyl is an independent record label founded in the Midwest, 1996.

We are a 100% independently owned and operated company.  We’ve grown steadily and organically: our catalog consists of over 400 releases from more than 100 artists.  We’re proud of our Midwest roots.  Polyvinyl HQ is located in Champaign, Illinois with additional staff in San Francisco, New York, Austin and elsewhere across the country. 

Polyvinyl’s mission is to support passionate, independently minded artists in creating timeless work, growing their careers and reaching their highest potential.  

Polyvinyl works hand-in-hand in fair partnership with artists.  We advocate for them, guide them, and allow artists to retain creative freedom and control.

Polyvinyl maintains a creative, open workplace that nurtures and develops talented people who are fulfilled by supporting artists.  We are always curious, learning, and willing to challenge our own assumptions.

Polyvinyl embraces our humble beginnings and DIY ethos by being positive, kind, and welcoming.  We strive for uniqueness, individuality and inclusivity in our staff and artist roster.

Name: Voiceover Soho
Description:
Our voiceover studios in London have been designed and purpose built as voice recording and audio post production facilities. Our team can help you choose your voice artists, create sound design, compose music and with a multitude of sound effects and music libraries ready to choose from creating the perfect mix for your production.

We can then deliver broadcast-ready mixes for commercials, films, documentaries, TV-series, radio, trailers, animations, video games, ADR, IVRs and much more in any format direct to your e-mail ready for download immediately after the session. All in the comfort of our 8 studio facilities across 3 sites in the centre of London’s Soho.

Name: Voicereels.com
Description: Get heard by casting directors worldwide with voice reels created by our award-winning team. We combine the proper selection of scripts, music and your unique performance, remotely or on location.

Name: HP AUTHENTIC RECORDS
Description:
HP AUTHENTIC RECORDS: A Sonic Journey 

HP Authentic Records is more than just a recording studio—it’s a sonic sanctuary where melodies are woven, beats are sculpted, and musical dreams come alive. Let’s delve into the captivating biography of this remarkable audio engineering house. 

Founders and Origins 

The story of HP Authentic Records begins with two visionary minds: MURAME Henry Petros  and IRAMBONA  Jean D'Amour. These pioneers, hailing from the heart of Kigali City, embarked on a journey that would revolutionize the world of sound.
MURAME Henry Petros 

• MURAMEHenryPetros, born on March 22, 1999, in Rusizi, Rwanda, was a Rwandan gospel singer and songwriter and co-founder of the Henry PetrosAuthenticRecords (HP AUTHENTICRECORDS) . 

• His passion for innovation led him to explore the realms of audio technology. From tinkering with circuits to envisioning groundbreaking solutions, Henry's genius knew no bounds. 

• Alongside IRAMBONA Jean D'Amour, he laid the foundation for HPAR, a company that would shape the future of computing, instrumentation, and—of course—audio engineering. 

The Birth of HP Authentic Records 

• In the heart of Kigali City, HP Authentic Records emerged as a haven for artists, producers, and sound enthusiasts. Its unassuming facade belied the magic brewing within. 

• The studio’s ethos? Authenticity. Every note, every chord, and every whisper had to resonate truth. No auto-tune, no shortcuts—just raw, unfiltered talent. 

Legacy and Influence 

• HP Authentic Records didn’t just produce music; it birthed movements. Its sonic fingerprints graced chart-toppers and underground anthems. 

• Artists flocked to its doorstep, seeking not just polished tracks but soul-stirring experiences. 

• Today, as we listen to the echoes of HP Authentic Records, we honor the legacy of MURAMEHenry Petros, IRAMBONA Jean D'Amour, and the countless engineers who shaped soundscapes.

Name: Idea Sonora
Description:
Idea Sonora is a sound post-production studio in Barcelona dedicated to advertising, with a long history since 2008.
We have collaborated on all kinds of projects both locally and internationally.

Services we offer: Voiceovers, Voice catalogue, Sound Design, Music Composition, Connections via Source-Connect, Session link pro, Zoom, Teams...

NEW IDEA PODCAST: Podcast production, Script creation, Video and audio editing, Music library licensing, Cover design, Multi-camera, Binaural recording.

Name: AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS
Description:
AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS, crafted by the visionary artist Lilx Brxaker, is a groundbreaking record label with a steadfast mission: to guide and propel artists on their journey to the luminous center stage. With an unwavering commitment to nurturing talent, AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS stands as a beacon of support for artists striving to unleash their artistic potential.

Led by Lilx Brxaker's profound understanding of the creative process, AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS has established itself as a haven where artists can thrive and evolve. The label's core purpose is to empower musicians, providing them with the necessary resources, guidance, and artistic freedom to actualize their visions to the fullest extent.

At AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS, collaboration is cherished, and the label fosters an environment where artists are encouraged to express their authentic selves. Through meticulous mentorship, the label's team works closely with each artist, ensuring their unique talents and artistic integrity remain intact throughout the creative journey.

By offering strategic guidance, production expertise, and extensive industry connections, AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS paves a clear path for artists to rise to their highest potential. From honing their musical craft to delivering awe-inspiring performances, the label assists artists in honing their skills, enabling them to captivate audiences and leave an indelible mark on the music industry.

With AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS, artists can trust that they are not merely joining a label, but rather entering into a collaborative partnership founded on trust, respect, and the unwavering belief in the power of artistic expression. Together, AEIK UNIVERSAL RECORDS and its artists illuminate the world with breathtaking music that resonates deeply with the hearts and souls of listeners, leaving an everlasting impact on the industry.

Name: The Vault
Description:
The Vault is a boutique record label & music services agency, operating in North America via Montreal & in Europe via Paris.

As a label, The Vault represents the Montreal duo Hansom Ēli, as well as the pianist and artist producer JaRon Marshall, known as the keyboardist of the Black Pumas, nominated multiple times at the Grammy Awards.

As an agency, The Vault works with:
✧ Artists & their teams
✧ Conferences, festivals & events
✧ Media

Past and current clients include: Wagram Stories, Universal Music France, Tôt Ou Tard, Label 6&7, Quebecor, PixMob, BETC / HAVAS Group, Lune Rouge, Cannes Film Festival, Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity, Madhive, M for Montréal, iHeartRadio, Amazon Music, Ponderosa Music & Art, M6, TF1, Live Nation (Lollapalooza, The Rolling Stones) and more.

Building international networks is one of The Vault’s strengths. Combined, Mathieu Deranlot and Alexandra Idiart-Benavides have been invited as participants or panelists to international conferences such as : Bogotá Music Market (Colombia), BIME Bilbao (Spain), SIM (Brazil), MUSEXPO and SyncUp Los Angeles, A2IM Indie Week (USA), FESTIMA - International Festival of Masks and the Arts (Benin / Burkina Faso), Clockenflap Festival in Hong Kong, Golden Melody Awards (Taiwan), The Asian Film Awards, Beijing International Film Festival, The Great Escape (UK), BIGSOUND (Australia), Reeperbahn Festival (Germany), Tallinn Music Week (Estonia), FIMpro (Mexico) & many more.

The Vault is passionate about fostering intercultural synergies, particularly in the
sectors of music, entertainment, technology & innovation, with the vision to
create new business opportunities for its artists and clients.

Name: VP Records
Description: VP Records, based in Jamaica, NY, is a pioneering force behind the international growth of reggae music. In the 40-plus years since its inception, the company has developed and currently maintains a wide range of label services from recording, publishing, and distribution of new and vintage musical artists, live event production, clothing and merchandise, wholesale, retail and Direct to consumer sales. Staying true to the roots of the music and continually expanding the vision is the company creed.

Name: German Wahnsinn GmbH
Description: German Wahnsinn ist eine 360° Audio Agentur mit zugehörigem Tonstudio-Komplex in Hamburg St. Pauli. Als Deutschlands kreativste Audio Agency begleiten wir als Sound- und Branding-Experten innovative Marken und Agenturen partnerschaftlich durch alle Phasen und Fallstricke der auditiven Markenführung und -Kommunikation, von der Strategiefindung und Beratung über die Konzeption und Kreation bis hin zur Produktion. Zum ganzheitlichen Leistungsspektrum gehört neben der einzigartig fundierten Audio Beratung und allen Services klassischer Ton- und Aufnahmestudios auch die Realisation immersiver Hörerlebnisse in XR und dem Metaverse. Weitere Impulse setzen wir mit dynamischem Storytelling und dem Einsatz neuester Technologien, darunter Gaming-Engines und eigenentwickelte Apps, Software und Tools für neuartige Audio Kreationen. Gemeinsam mit der Bestseller-Autorin Cornelia Funke betreiben wir den Boutique Hörbuchverlag Atmende Bücher.

Name: Little Things Sound Studios
Description:
We are Little Things. An independent sound studio specialising in voice recording and sound design for creative agencies, production companies and brands.

We're all about the little details and believe by being obsessed with the little things amazing things will emerge.

From our home in the heart of Soho we obsess over sound in all its forms every day. We are a small team and that’s where our strength lies.

To request a rate card or discuss an upcoming project please get in touch.

Description:
Hi, we're Sound Goods! We're a new company with the same familiar, friendly faces you've come to know and trust over the past 20+ years. We're thrilled you're here, taking the time to check us out. Now, let us introduce ourselves...

We specialize in creating soundscapes that elevate every experience. From crafting attention-grabbing sound design to ensuring every detail in your mix is just how you want it, you can count on us to be there every step of the way.  

Remote or in-person, we've got you covered. Wherever you are, we'll meet you there. And with some of the best talent in the industry, you can trust us to deliver every time. 

Let's make some noise together!

Name: Loudness
Description:
Fundada em 1976 por irmãos, a Loudness nasceu para preencher uma lacuna no mercado de “show business” no Brasil, ainda pouco explorado à época. Com foco em equipamentos de alta qualidade, som profissional e, sobretudo, um atendimento especializado, a Loudness se destacou como referência em áudio e vídeo.

Atualmente, atuamos em quatro áreas principais: Projetos Especiais, Sonorização, Comunicação, e Gravação e Broadcasting e continuamos comprometidos em levar tecnologia de ponta e inovação para o mercado de áudio e vídeo do Brasil e da América Latina.

Name: Firdaus Studio
Description:
Firdaus Studio at Expo City Dubai is one of the world’s most advanced recording studio. Initiated in 2022,the studio offers an unparalleled recording experience and has established itself as a destination for artists from across the globe to meet, create, and be inspired.

As Dubai’s first Certified Dolby Atmos HE studio, Firdaus Studio upholds the highest recording standards used by global giants like Apple Music and Amazon Music. The studio is equipped with best-in-class gear and in-house instruments, including a Steinway Model D Grand Piano. 

Some of our clients include Coldplay, Beyoncé, Netflix, Paramount Pictures, Madras Talkies, MDL Beast, Aldar, Atif Aslam, Disney, Sony Music, Filmmaster, Mani Rathnam, Santhosh Narayanan, Universal Music India, Yuvan Sankar Raja, Shekar Kapur, Coke Studio, Dolby, Zumba Fitness, Ben & Ben, and many more.

The UAE is experiencing an arts & culture boom, and the studio aspires to be an environment that champions the next generation of talent, building on the legacy and the spirit of Expo 2020 Dubai. 

The studio has also become the recording home of the award winning, genre-defying, all-female ensemble, the Firdaus Orchestra.

Description:
Noatune Studios is a recording studio based in the creative hub of Hackney, London offering; 

- Studio Dry Hire 
- Voiceover/ Podcast/ Audiobook Recording
- Mixing & Mastering 
- Premier Engineering 

Noatune's Studio Dry Hire is a fantastic option for artists, songwriters and producers who wish to work on their own or with a team. We also offer Recording and Mixing services as well as Voiceover/ Podcast recording with our experienced in-house engineers.

Our 4 studios come with an incredible selection of mics and equipment. Featuring beautiful Scandinavian interiors, state-of-the-art acoustics, inspiring creative environment and helpful friendly staff.

Name: GL Music Entertainment A/S
Description:
GL MUSIC ENTERTAINMENT A/S is a publishing, label & TV Production company representing some of the leading scandinavian songwriters, artist, musicians and producers as well as some of the worlds leading independent music publishers. 

GL MUSIC ENTERTAINMENT A/S where founded in 2011 and has been working with the leading Scandinavian and international independent and major labels, television stations and film companies regarding songwriting, production and album releases for various artists, TV series, movies ect. 

They are a Copenhagen based team from Denmark and Sweden and since the start they have participated in no. 1 singles/albums, success TV shows and blockbuster Movies. They have produced and written songs for various gold and platinum selling artists and their songs have sold more than 30 million physical albums and singles around the world and streamed so many times that we don't really know..

GL MUSIC ENTERTAINMENT A/S is in charge of Musical Direction on TV shows like X-FACTOR, MENTOR, TALENT and VOICE JUNIOR on national TV in Denmark. In 2015 we founded a TV production department focusing on music TV content and formats. The first production was the 24 episode 'Rasmus Klump Julestue' in collaboration with Egmont Kids Publishing. 

GL MUSIC ENTERTAINMENT A/S also represent and sub-publish over 500.000+ copyrights in scandinavia from publishers all over the world. These catalogs include Cloud 9 Music (Netherlands), Roba Music Publishing (Germany), The Royalty Network (US), Schedler Music (Austria), Css Rights Management (Canada), 120 Publishing (Australia), A&G Songs (UK), PEN Music Group (US), Memory Lane (US), Red Brick Songs (Canada), Casablanca Media Publishing (Canada), Modern Works Publishing (US), Jackback Publishing (France) and great hit songs from artists like Justin Bieber, Cardi B, Johnny Cash, Elvis Presley, Corinne Bailey Rae to big DJ superstars like David Guetta, Lost Frequencies, Amin Van Buuren, Hardwell, Felix Jahn and many more...

Name: Blackbird Studio
Description: Nashville's premier recording studio with nine world-class rooms and a dazzling collection of gear.

Name: Uncharted Records

We're not just a record label; we're a community-driven platform where artists and fans unite under a shared mission to amplify unheard voices in Hip-Hop & R&B.

Name: GONG audio
Description:
Studio de création sonore, GONG aime quand le monde résonne. 

Derrière Gong, deux amis d’enfance, deux passionnés du son, Jean-Baptiste Meunier et Samuel Hirsch. Ingénieur du son, Jean-Baptiste est un entrepreneur inépuisable, à la tête d’un studio de numérisation et de restauration sonore. À ses côtés, Samuel, un vieux de la vieille du podcast, travaille aux côtés de l’équipe d’Arte Radio depuis ses débuts. Aujourd’hui maître sorcier des studios de Gong, il a réalisé de nombreux podcasts salués par la critique et adorés du grand public, comme Un podcast à soi ou Bookmakers. Ensemble, ils se sont lancés un nouveau défi : réunir leur expertise et leur passion pour fonder Gong. 

 Chez Gong on travaille tous azimuts, aussi bien avec des institutions, des marques de luxes, des médias, ou d’autres studios de production. 

 Réalisation de podcasts, post-production, mixage, formations, création de musiques originales et d’identités sonores : parce que vos histoires sont uniques, nous vous proposons un accompagnement sur-mesure. 

 Installés à Montreuil, nos studios sont abrités dans un grand bâtiment, au coeur d’un quartier qui fourmille de projets artistiques. Nos espaces s’adaptent à la fois aux grandes productions ambitieuses et à celles plus intimistes.

 Vous êtes une marque, un média, une institution et vous voulez développer un podcast avec nous ? Contactez-nous : contact@gong.audio

Name: RFI Labo
Description:
RFI Labo est l'Unité d'innovation de France Médias Monde. Spécialisée dans l'audio 3D, nous produisons les programmes sonores immersifs du groupe comme SessionLab, Les Voisins du 12 bis ou Si Loin Si Proche. Mais nous accompagnons aussi des projets extérieurs dans les domaines de la musique, du podcast, de la vidéo ou de la VR. 
En co-production, en partenariat ou en prestation, RFI Labo propose son savoir faire et ses équipements pour toutes les étapes d'un projet. De la prise de son en studio ou en reportage, jusqu'au mixage dans tous les formats immersifs. Validé ATMOS Musique, RFI Labo dispose d'expertises multiples au sein de son équipe. 
Nos références: Milgram, Narrative, UNESCO, Universcience, Musée Fernand Léger, Musée Chagall, Le Grand Palais, ARTE Concert, Le printemps des poètes, Bibliothèque sans Frontière, IRD ...

Name: Billyboom - Sound Design
Description: Em publicidade, no cinema ou streaming, o nosso foco está na construção de histórias através do som, da criação de bandas sonoras à pós-produção áudio, trabalhando nos formatos de som mais simples ou nos imersivamente mais complexos.

Name: CMH Label Group
Description: CMH Records is a Los Angeles-based, independent country and bluegrass label with several subsidiary labels, including Vitamin Records, Crosscheck, Dwell, and Rockabye Baby Music. The label releases diverse styles of music including string quartet tributes, punk, metal, bluegrass, rock, and lullabies. CMH is also home to the well-known Vitamin String Quartet as well as Rockabye Baby!, our award-winning children's lullaby series.

Name: Sound’Ink
Description:

Description:
Depuis la création de l'atelier des Lumières en 2018, le développement exponentiel des expériences immersives ouvre un champ incroyable à la création et au mixage sonore 360°.

50% du succès d'une expérience immersive passe par le son : renforcer le réalisme de l'expérience, capter l'attention du spectateur, décupler l'émotion ressentie.
Les collaborations entre les artistes audio et visuels sont infinies.

MurmuraSoundLab est un studio de conception, création et mixage de son spatialisé tous formats et en particulier ambisonique, mais pas que !  
Nous proposons un espace unique en France sur Tours : un studio de création, de mixage et d'écoute ambisonique : 90m2, 4.5 m de hauteur sous plafond pour s'immerger totalement dans une sphère sonore immersive de 360°.

Des résidences d'artistes seront organisées afin d'accompagner et former les créateurs de musique pour leur permettre d'intégrer le potentiel incroyable du son spatialisé dans leurs créations.

Nous sommes des créateurs de sons, certains musiciens. Nous intervenons à toutes les étapes de la chaîne de production sonore : enregistrement, montage, sound design, mixage, avec une spécialisation sur le mixage immersif en ambisonie. 

Nous collaborons avec les créateurs d'expériences immersives à la fois pour la création mais aussi le mixage spatialisé du son. Nous les conseillons aussi dans la définition de l'environnement technique nécessaire à la création de l'expérience.

Nos domaines d'intervention sont multiples :
- Expositions immersive
- Installations temporaires dans des lieux patrimoniaux
- Réalité virtuelle, films VR
- Podcasts immersifs
- Concerts immersifs 
- Formation Ingénieurs du Son
....

MurmuraSoundLab fait partie du groupe Big Incredible - A ce titre le studio est en charge de la spatialisation sonore des films diffusés dans TADAMM @tadamm-immersive

Name: Crown Booth
Description:
Crown Booth is a modern recording studio built inside one of the world’s most iconic pieces of design: the British red telephone box.
We are transforming a global symbol of communication into a new kind of creative infrastructure — one that merges culture, design, and technology into an accessible micro-studio for artists, brands, and cities.

Our vision is simple: turn an icon into a platform.
Each Crown Booth is a fully equipped, sound-treated recording environment designed for voice, music, storytelling, and content creation. It gives creators a professional space in the heart of the city — without the friction, cost, or inaccessibility of traditional recording studios.

At the same time, Crown Booth restores value to telephone boxes that would otherwise sit unused, vandalized, or abandoned. We see them not as relics, but as legendary architectural shells ready for rebirth. By preserving them, upgrading them, and giving them a modern purpose, Crown Booth connects the UK’s cultural heritage to the global creative economy.

This is more than a studio — it’s an experience.
A Crown Booth feels iconic on the outside and intimate on the inside. It is designed for creators who need a reliable space for recording, voiceovers, podcasts, content, auditions, demos, and remote collaboration. It also supports brands and partners who want high-impact, hyper-local creative touchpoints within communities.

Our mission is to scale Crown Booth across major cities and cultural centres, establishing a network of beautifully designed, intelligently powered micro-studios. Each installation becomes a landmark — a place where creativity meets convenience, and where storytelling becomes accessible to anyone walking by.

Crown Booth stands at the intersection of design, sound, technology, and culture.
We are building something iconic, functional, globally recognizable — and undeniably British.

Creativity deserves a home. We’re building it, one booth at a time.

Over the years, a lot of Pro audio manufacturers have fascinated me with their ground breaking inventions and concepts. Inspired by these people, I tried to piece together a console which could accommodate all my fascinations into one box and impart its sheen and warmth to every audio in my multi tracks. 

A dream you dream by yourself is a dream. A dream you dream together is a reality! 
I want to live this reality by involving everyone who wants to be a part of this process of console building, workflow optimisation and just having fun! 
Let's share our knowledge and passion while creating a possibility to live into.

We are situated in The Netherlands and since 2012 our studio complex has been a top notch facility for composition, recording and post-production. Featuring multiple PMC equiped control rooms, a big live room, booths and a ‘Dolby Atmos Music Professional’ room.

Our mission:
Our goal when starting Jonathan Hendrickx was to create music which allows you to be more creative and productive at an entirely new scale, with the benefit of creating a completely immersive experience for the viewer or listener. Whether it’s a big and lush orchestral composition, a dark ambient electronic piece or a high energy, exciting rock track. With the way we create music, each production is a piece of art, created to fit your production.

Name: Smash Hits
Description:
Smash Hits es una compañía dinámica e innovadora de producción musical que se ha convertido rápidamente en un jugador importante en la industria. Con un sonido único que la distingue de la competencia, la compañía está dedicada a trabajar con talentos emergentes en Puerto Rico y más allá.

Aunque Smash Hits aún no ha producido una canción exitosa, su historial habla por sí solo. La compañía ha colocado a sus artistas en algunas de las plataformas más grandes de la industria, incluyendo "Eso es un Vibe" de Omar Courtz, "Suave Rico" de De La Ghetto ft. Rauw Alejandro, "Yo Soy Tuyo" de De La Ghetto, "Sedúceme" de Guelo Star ft. Rafa Pabon y "Necesito de ti" de Guelo Star ft. Ivy Queen. Estas colocaciones han ayudado a establecer a la compañía como una fuerza importante en la escena de la música urbana.

Una de las razones del éxito de Smash Hits es su compromiso con la colaboración y la innovación. Los productores de la compañía, Super Solo y Mistel Kind, trabajan en estrecha colaboración con sus artistas para desarrollar un sonido único que mezcla la música urbana puertorriqueña con un sonido comercial global. Este enfoque ha resultado en un estilo distintivo que está ganando reconocimiento en todo el mundo.

Además de producir música, Smash Hits también está activamente involucrada en la creación de contenido, con un podcast que ha ayudado a llamar la atención de la industria musical. El próximo proyecto de la compañía, YKWGTS, es uno de los más ambiciosos hasta ahora y promete mostrar su enfoque innovador en la producción musical.

En general, Smash Hits es una compañía en ascenso, con un historial de éxito y un compromiso con la innovación y la colaboración. A medida que continúa trabajando con talentos emergentes en Puerto Rico y más allá, no hay duda de que seguirá causando revuelo en la industria musical en los próximos años.

Name: ModernSonics

Bei dem Zusammenspiel zwischen Bild und Ton spielt der Sound eine entscheidende Rolle. Erzeugen Ihre Medienprojekte schon den Impact, den Sie sich wünschen?

Seit mehr als 6 Jahren bin ich als Komponist und Sounddesigner in der Medienbranche tätig. In dieser Zeit habe ich vielen Teams und Agenturen dabei geholfen, Ihre Projekte für nationale und internationale Unternehmen mitreißend und eindrucksvoll zu gestalten.

Es ist meine Leidenschaft, kreativen Produktionen mithilfe von bewegender Musik und detailreichem Sounddesign Charakter und Ausdruck zu verleihen. Deshalb biete ich:

- Ein großes musikalisches und tontechnisches Verständnis
- Eine transparente Kommunikation
- Ein unkompliziertes und effektives Teamwork bei der Ausarbeitung der Sound-Vision
- Ein umfangreiches Know-how im Bereich der Medienproduktion
- Leidenschaft für meine Arbeit

Wenn Sie gerne mehr über mich und meine Arbeit erfahren wollen, dann besuchen sie www.modernsonics.de

In 2020, began received my coding certificate through UNC Bootcamps. This is where I started Equinox Crest Productions as a mock record label for my portfolio homework. Name: Clockwork Sessions
Description:
Clockwork Sessions is a recording company founded in 2017 specialising in orchestral soundtracks for Film, TV, and Games. We manage sessions from our main studio and contract our own Scottish Session Orchestra, all recorded by our Grammy winning recording engineer David Donaldson. We are fortunate to be able to draw from the UK’s leading session musicians, international soloists and concertmasters, as well as the wealth of world class orchestral, chamber and jazz musicians, all of whom bring years of studio experience.
With a team of seasoned in-house orchestrators, producers, engineers, copyists, librarians and videographers, we have the experience and talents to provide the backbone for your scoring projects. As every client’s needs differ, we customise our service and have coordinated hundreds of sessions from vocal, traditional, jazz and sampling, through to large orchestral sessions for major Hollywood composers.

Having recorded scores for clients such as Hans Zimmer (Pipers for the Oscar winning score for Dune), Jim Fowler (Sony), Outlaw King (orchestral score, Netflix), Christian Henson (Apple), Spitfire Audio (Albion Solstice and Colossus), we offer the highest level of recording in some of the most formidable acoustics in the UK. We also offer a range of hospitality packages to give you and your team the warmest of welcomes when you choose to record in Glasgow (Unesco city of Music).

Name: Goodside Records
Description:
GOODSIDE RECORDS

Sydney, Australia | Est. 2019 | Founded by CARTER (AU)

Goodside Records is a forward-thinking House & Tech House record label based in Sydney, Australia — founded and curated by artist and label boss CARTER (AU).

Since launching in 2019, Goodside has built a reputation for quality over hype, championing emerging and established artists who push the boundaries of modern House and Tech House. Our vision is simple: to create a borderless platform for authentic, cutting-edge dance music from around the world — where talent speaks louder than social status.

Goodside’s releases span the full spectrum of club culture — from rolling underground grooves to peak-time festival anthems — consistently earning the support of global tastemakers, major DJs, and leading platforms.

Highlights & Recognition:

 Featured on BBC Radio 1, BLANC, Triple j, Data Transmission, Soundspace, PROFOUND, CERTIFIED, and Multiple ARIA Club Chart Top 10's. 

 Playlist placements on Spotify (Operator, House Brasil, Fresh Finds, Crate Diggers), Apple Music, and Beatport editorial selections

 Supported by industry heavyweights including John Summit, FISHER, Chris Lake, Tiësto, MEDUZA, James Hype, GORDO, Jamie Jones, Shiba San, Sam Divine, Marco Faraone, and more

 Home to a growing international artist roster and community spanning Australia, United Kingdom, Europe, North America, and Latin America & more!

 Known for consistent visual branding, label identity, and high-quality mastering through Goodside Studios

Goodside continues to expand its influence across digital platforms, live events, and artist development — driving the next wave of House music culture from Sydney to the world.

Description:
Amplified Studios is a music production studio owned and operated by musicians and engineers. Whether you want to learn, create, rehearse, record, or promote your music - we help artists navigate the music industry. Every artist deserves a community that amplifies their sound.

Founded by Bob Berman, the studio was originally created for him to jam and record with his musician friends. After some consideration, he decided to expand Amplified into a proper business with a tight-knit team, state-of-the-art equipment and programs, and an atmosphere fostering community and collaboration amongst artists.

Name: Glaux Records
Description:
Glaux Records takes its name from the owl (glaux), the bird sacred to Athena in ancient Greece. The word glaux also describes the shining colour of Athena’s eyes – a symbol of clarity, learning, and insight. For us, it reflects a way of approaching music: thoughtful, attentive, and always in dialogue with knowledge.

Our work grows out of a conviction that the centre of any musical project must be the composer and the composition itself. At Glaux we believe that artists shine most brightly when they place their skills and imagination at the service of the score, bringing the music to life through insight, technique, and sensitivity.

The catalogue of Glaux develops along three closely connected paths. A first area focuses on repertoire that is rarely performed or on familiar works presented in ways that distinguish themselves for interpretative refinement. A second strand is dedicated to keyboard music of every period and instrument, exploring its richness across centuries. A third opens onto those moments when art music has intersected with folk traditions, generating unexpected beauty.

Glaux Records is guided by the expertise of its founders. Stefano Aresi brings a precise artistic direction and a discerning eye for collaboration, shaping the choice of repertoire and performers. Andrea Friggi contributes his acclaimed technical mastery, ensuring that each recording reflects the intellectual and artistic vision of the project. Together, they cultivate a label where research and interpretation coexist, where performers engage deeply with composers’ intentions, and where every release embodies thoughtfulness, refinement, and respect for the music.

Name: Ambisonic Music Library
Description:
3D Music: From the Ground Up.

Specifically crafted, bespoke works, native to Ambisonics. Available exclusively through the Ambisonic Music Library.

Our artists craft each of their pieces in Ambisonics from the outset – no remixing or upscaling of existing stereo works. We believe that in order to achieve something truly spatial, each hi-hat, guitar, vocal and string must be considered in 3D from the beginning. That’s how our music stands out from the rest.

Reverbs? Real-Worlds.
Isn’t that bowed low-C on the 2nd cello just exquisite…? Who cares! We care about the whole picture: be immersed in multiple scenes throughout listening journeys; be right where the drummer sits when they belt out a solo; hear mono arpeggiated synths come alive in abstract environments; experience a true spatial doppler effect… of electric guitars. Be there, here.

In Stereo, in Surround.
Stereo? Great. Binaural? Even better. A 48 channel array with 6 subs? Now you’re talking. Listen to our bespoke works in a multitude of surround audio formats. With Higher-Order Ambisonics, you lose none of the detail.

Simplicity? Realised.
Look, we’re not trying to re-write the book, or get you to invest in a new home cinema system… no gimmicks here, nor random pianos coming from your rear surrounds. Simply, we have created music which we think sounds and works great in Ambisonics, and we’d love to hear your feedback. Get in touch at info@ambisonicmusiclibrary.com

Licensing? We got you.
Want to incorporate one of our artists records in your project? Need to work with them closely to realise your vision? Contact us at info@ambisonicmusiclibrary.com

Name: Cities and Memory
Description:
Cities and Memory brings together the worlds of field recording, sound art and composition to create a new form of listening.

The project is founded around the concept of working creatively with sound to explore concepts of place and memory - and to experience the world differently through sound.

Artists work with field recordings as source material and inspiration to create brand new compositions, building an alternative, imagined world of sound to explore.

It is completely open to anyone in the world to take part, by contributing a sound recording or a composition to the project - we have built a global community of more than 2,000 contributing artists. Cities and Memory covers more than 130 countries and territories, with more than 7,000 sounds to explore.

Cities and Memory, and its founder and sound artist Stuart Fowkes, partner with brands and organisations to put a creative use of sound at the heart of their communications.

This can be through partnerships, physical or online sound installations, global sound sourcing, training sessions around sound, recording and creative uses of sound, presentations and so on.

Name: The Talking Book
Description:
The Talking Book is an independent audiobook recording studio located in Asheville, North Carolina.

Name: Red Shift Mastering
Description:
What is Mastering? 
Mastering is the essential final step in preparing your music for release into the real world, adding that extra bit of magic and ensuring your listeners a great musical experience. Music creators spend many weeks and months on their projects, a mastering engineer offers an unbiased, fresh set of ears, with the experience, passion and expertise to unlock the full potential of your music.

How does it work?
It’s more than just making your tracks louder. We aim to bring out the emotion, increasing the sense of depth and space, while adding warmth, clarity and punch. Striving to achieve an classy major-label sound, that will sound great on any playback system. The aim is to bring the artist’s vision to life, treating each and every note with the same level of care as it’s creator. Your passion is our passion, so let’s turn your mixes into a great record!

Whether you are an artist seeking top-notch production services, a band in need of rehearsal space, a filmmaker looking for captivating audio for your project, or an individual interested in learning music, Joel's Music Lab is the go-to destination for all your audio and music-related needs. Name: Eternal Vida Records
Description:
We are a full-service (free) recording studio based in Balneário Camboriú, Brazil. We provide free custom beats of almost any genre, record your vocals (we help with songwriting if requested) mix, master, and help release your music (we currently do not yet offer music promotion services). In exchange for our work, we take a 1% to 10% cut of all royalties after profits for any beat used or song recorded with us depending on the level of work involved. If you record at our studio, we automatically will take a 10% cut of all royalty profits from anything recorded at our studio. It is up to the client to determine profits so that if the artist invests a lot in marketing and doesn't make a profit, they won't owe us the 10% royalty cut.

You must show proof of singing, rapping, or beat-making skills in order to record at our studio as we are looking to work mostly with skilled but relatively unknown or up-and-coming artists.

We mostly focus on rap, pop, EDM, and Brazilian funk, although we are open to working with other genres.

If you are not local to us in Brazil, you may send us raw vocals and beats to mix and master in exchange for a royalties cut (percentage varies based on the level of work involved).

Name: Atma Studio
Description:
ATMA STUDIO é um projeto que nasceu do sonho de Vinícius Alves, um músico e compositor apaixonado por produção musical. Desde criança, sua paixão por música caminhou lado a lado com a sua curiosidade e vontade de gravar e registrar tudo o que fazia. Foi daí que veio seu primeiro álbum, em 2016, chamado Mantra, gravado e arranjado completamente sozinho em seu quarto, que na época ainda tinha poucos recursos. Em 2018, veio o disco Dos Mares Que Nos Habitam, e em 2020, Onde O Sol Nunca Se Põe. Com essa trilogia de álbuns autorais, findou-se então um ciclo de aprendizado, que durou enquanto ele ainda dividia o espaço como metade estúdio, metade quarto.


Foi só no fim de 2020, que enfim Vinícius tomou coragem e tirou tudo que fazia com que aquele cômodo ainda fosse o seu quarto e seu laboratório pessoal, e o Atma Studio nasceu oficialmente. Desde então, muita música e arte são feitas nesse espaço, e muitos tipos diferentes de serviço são oferecidos, como: gravação, arranjo musical, mixagem, masterização, composição de trilhas sonoras, design gráfico de capas e encartes, e gravação de vídeos. Tudo isso só é possível por meio da ajuda de grandes parceiros e amigos que estão sempre caminhando lado a lado com o Vinícius, ajudando-o a construir esse sonho.

Collaboriamo con importanti Major, Artisti e realtà discografiche italiane, ed ogni progetto musicale, dal professionista al privato viene seguito con la stessa cura e passione.

The main studio is a large format recording studio, an 800ft2 recording haven, boasting the finest analogue and digital workflows. The studios are fully residential, with artists staying in a beautifully modernised 20th Century farmhouse that can sleep up to 10 people.

Name: Utopia Studios Bearsville
Description:
Utopia Studios Bearsville, owned and operated by multi-platinum studio and live engineer Pete Caigan, is located at the iconic Utopia Complex in Woodstock, New York. Utopia offers cutting-edge facilities for music and film production, tour rehearsals, and live album recording from Bearsville Theater. 

Boasting a spacious live room, full lighting grid, and an API AXS Legacy Recording Console, the studio is equipped with everything artists and producers need to create their next masterpiece. 

The space has a storied history as Todd Rundgren's former studio, built by Albert Grossman as part of the Bearsville Recording Empire and featuring architectural design by John Storyk. 

Utopia was operated by Radio Woodstock as their broadcast facility and music production house from 2003-2019. Purchased by entrepreneur Lizzie Vann in 2019, it has completely been renovated and brought back to its original glory.

Caigan's experience with artists like Sarah McLachlan and Newport Festivals makes Utopia an unparalleled destination for creativity.

Name: Old Street Studios
Description:
Welcome to Old Street Studios, a state of the art recording and mastering facility located in the heart of London. 

Renowned for delivering unparalleled audio, we offer first-class services encompassing recording, mixing, mastering and sound design, graphic and web design, retouching, video production and live visuals. Our expert team and our cutting-edge technology ensure the highest quality output for your art.

Old Street Studios is the result of the joining forces of a creative group of people with different backgrounds under the same roof and ethos. We are equipped with the technology and experience to bring you the best possible solutions for your projects on time and on budget. We offer a friendly atmosphere and efficient workflow.

Have your music mixed by our experienced engineers using a combination of classic vintage analogue outboard gear and the latest digital technology.
Allow one of our in house mastering engineers to fine tune your mix in an acoustically treated room using some of the best speakers and analogue outboard equipment available.

Experience unparalleled sound and elevate your music to the next level at Old Street Studios.

#OldStreetNewSound #OldStreetStudios

Name: Broadwood Music Productions Ltd
Description:
Broadwood Music Productions are a sound recording and music production studio based in an idyllic country location in the heart of Kent UK. The beautiful location lends itself to a very relaxing and inspiring atmosphere to allow your creativity to flourish. For long term projects there are two self contained accomodation flats that were previously stables, one can hold three people and the other four.

The recording studio itself comprises of a spacious live room large enough for live band performances with the addition of two sound proofed booths for vocals and amps etc. The fully equipped control room is the heart of the complex comprising of an SSL AWS900+ hybrid mixing console alongside outboard gear from names like Neve, Universal Audio, Stam Audio, Lexicon and others. There is also various musical instruments, amps, drums, keyboards and an upright piano for clients use. 

The studio facilities also include a fully equipped Kitchen area to make food and refreshmentsand and generally chill outside of the studio environment. If the weather is good there is also a patio area outside with seating .. ideal to take in those views. Furthermore there is an ensuite toilet/shower room from the kitchen and each of the rooms are fully air conditioned. Lastly, there is ample parking and you are two minutes drive from the centre of Marden where there are shops and pubs.

Our services include, but are not limited to, band and artist recording, mixing and mastering, music production, songwriting, audio editing, voiceovers, ADR, video editing and anything else you can think of.

Whether you are a professional band with a label behind you or would just like to record your first album as a solo artist Broadwood Music productions is the ideal place for you.

Embark on a journey of sonic excellence at IMP Records, your all-encompassing solution for professional recording needs. Within our walls, we foster an individualized working environment that empowers artists and bands to immerse themselves in their creative and artistic processes.

NitroSonic Studios was founded way back in 2005 by producer Brian Pulito, with a mission to provide the best recording experience possible at an affordable price. Since then, NitroSonic Studios has grown and expanded into one of the region’s top destination studios.
In late 2018, engineer Danielle Barkman and studio musician/friend Leah Arrington were handed the reins, and they have taken NitroSonic Studios to all new highs. In 2022, studio manager and engineer, Abbi Rhodes, became our third co-owner.

Boasting newly constructed studios at a convenient down town location, state of the art gear, and a live room with a sound beyond description, Nitrosonic Studios is more ready than ever to help take your project from idea to mastered songs.

Located in the heart of Lexington’s NOLI District, Nitrosonic Studios is surrounded by some of the most exciting and vibrant cafes & restaurants, music clubs, shops and stores in town. Truly an artist district, we are engulfed by a creative and talented vibe that can be felt. 

It is this combination of location, technology and musical know-how that has caused Nitrosonic Studios to become the most popular destination studio in the area. 

Why pay Nashville prices, if you can get Nashville quality (or better) for less money? 

-Gigabit Ethernet connected
-Cozy and creative, tucked away in Lexington’s popular North Lime District.
-Several restaurants within walking distance
-Air BNB available
-Cutting edge technology

Name: TrueVoice Communications
Description:
At TrueVoice Communications, we specialise in professionally managing business voice systems over time.

Not just recording voices — managing them.

We support businesses with:
• Managed telephone and IVR voice systems
• Message on hold and call-flow voice design
• Professional human and AI voice integration
• Ongoing updates, changes, and continuity
• Consistent voice branding across platforms

Too often, phone voices are treated as a once-off task: record it, upload it, forget it.

The result? Outdated messages, inconsistent voices, and a poor caller experience.

We take a different approach.

TrueVoice manages your company’s voice as a long-term business asset — with continuity, care, and real human oversight — so your brand sounds established, credible, and in control at every touchpoint.

No long-term contracts.
Human and AI voices, professionally managed.
Built for growing and established businesses.

Your Company’s Voice — Expertly Managed.

Name: Rustic Roots Music
Description:
At Rustic Roots, we believe great music starts at the ground level, on porches, in small clubs, and anywhere passion meets authenticity. Our mission is to discover and develop emerging Americana, country-rock, and roots-pop artists, giving them the tools to flourish without losing their independent spirit.

What we do:
	•	Artist Development – hands-on A&R, songwriting support, and career guidance
	•	Recording & Production – access to premier studios, producers, and session players
	•	Marketing & Promotion – data-driven campaigns spanning streaming, radio, video, and live events
	•	Distribution & Sync – global digital distribution, physical releases, and sync licensing opportunities
	•	Community Building – showcases, songwriter rounds, and philanthropic partnerships that keep us rooted in Nashville’s creative scene

Rustic Roots blends creative freedom with innovative business practices. We value transparency, fair deals, and a collaborative culture in which artists, fans, and partners thrive.

Follow us for label news, artist spotlights, and upcoming releases, or reach out to explore partnership opportunities. Let’s grow something timeless, one song at a time.

Name: Baltic Studios
Description:
Baltic is home to three recording studios in East London, which are the birthplace of recordings from artists including Björk, London Contemporary Orchestra, Sampha, Blood Orange, Cleo Sol and Arctic Monkeys. Each of our studios has been designed with a commitment to beautiful interior spaces, and provides world-class equipment and highly skilled engineers and technicians. For over a decade, we have hosted some of the leading artists and producers in contemporary music across a wide range of sessions — from small writing projects to large-scale orchestral recordings.

In 2020 we launched Baltic ATM, a not-for-profit artist development programme. Each year, the programme supports eight emerging artists facing financial barriers, offering cost-free access to our studios, mixing & mastering, mentorship and professional development. ATM is currently funded by Arts Council England and delivered alongside four community partners, Power Up, Ladies Music Pub, Grounded Sounds and NTS. Applications are open exclusively to artists affiliated with our partners.

Name: Studio Martínek
Description:
For over seven decades, Studio Martínek has been a destination for leading composers and performers, offering top-tier engineering, lush acoustics, and a setting steeped in history. Located in Prague—where greats like Mozart, Dvořák, and Janáček once thrived—our stunning Art Nouveau hall provides an inspiring space to bring your music to life. With a legacy that includes recordings by icons like Vladimir Ashkenazy and Sir Charles Mackerras, Studio Martínek continues to shape the sound of classical music today.

Now operated by PARMA Recordings, the GRAMMY-winning music production company, Studio Martínek is poised for an exciting new chapter. With PARMA’s expertise and commitment to artistic excellence, this union will bring new opportunities for musicians, ensuring that Studio Martínek remains a premier destination for groundbreaking recordings for years to come.

Name: Access Analog
Description:
Access Analog gives musicians and recording engineers real time access to professional analog audio outboard gear over a standard internet connection. Audio streams from the Analog Matrix plugin across the internet, through the analog hardware, and returns to the plugin in real time.  Robotics are employed on the face of the equipment to give the user real time control of the device using the plugin interface.  Access Analog provides the full functionality of the most desired professional audio hardware in the industry at a fraction of the cost, while adding the benefits of full recall, presets, automation, and mobility that until now have only been available in software plugins.

The Analog Matrix plugin remotely controls the physical knobs, buttons, and switches on the audio hardware.  Robotics are attached to each control and precisely track changes made in the plugin user interface, as well as all control automation created within the host audio application.  Meters and indicators are precisely tracked on the device and displayed in the plugin interface exactly at it exists on the hardware, in sync with the audio.  Users can build multiple analog devices in series to create amazing analog chains and save all devices and controls as presets for instant recall.

For the first time ever, musicians and engineers can process audio in real time using robotically controlled analog hardware in the cloud.  The Analog Matrix works as a plugin inside all major digital audio workstations.

Et surtout, la première question en amène une seconde, puis une troisième, une quatrième, etc… donc il y a toujours un moment où je finis par m’incliner. 
Quare est un podcast encyclopédique créé avant tout pour répondre aux questions des enfants. Les thématiques abordées sont la géographie, l’histoire, l’art, la nature et le sport. 
Ainsi, nous nous interrogerons sur les pays du monde, les personnages historiques marquants, les célébrités du monde de l’art et du spectacle, les animaux et les sportifs de haut niveau.

Name: Dance Mastering
Description:
What good is the best song, the supposedly next big hit, or the most expensive production, if the title or the master does not sound right or is not loud enough and therefore not competitive?

If you want to compete in the music market, professional mastering is a must.

In addition to the creative aspect, the sound of a song is also decisive for success or non-success. In the end, it is also about presenting yourself on all relevant music platforms (such as Spotify, Apple Music, Youtube) and listening situations (such as a club/disco, living room, kitchen radio, or smartphone) in the best possible way.

The so-called mastering is always the last and at the same time decisive instance of music production. A very complex field in which only the highest quality tools and processors are used, and which requires a lot of experience and empathy.

It is exactly these requirements that Matthias Menck offers as a longtime Dipl. audio engineer and music producer.

Since the mastering process of an electronic dance track is very different from conventional mastering, even professional and non-specialized mastering studios regularly work up a sweat when it comes to club and dance music.

As an active producer and DJ for many years, there is hardly a more experienced mastering engineer who has mastered the electronic genres in all their facets and varieties.

Whether it is House Music, Deep House, Tech House, Bass & Future House, Tropical, Electro, Techno, EDM, Trance, Goa, Trap, Hip Hop or RnB, Matthias Menck knows exactly what it has to sound like and what it needs to do to achieve it.

Several Gold & Platinum awards, as well as international chart rankings such as US Billboard Charts speak for themselves.

Each master is created individually and is NOT just processed through a preset template.

Whether that’s via sonic teleportation, designing and building new technologies, finding new ways to connect to ourselves and with nature, or quite literally creating new methods of making music.

Name: Studio Moya
Description:
140 millions d'écoutes de podcasts par mois, rien qu'en France.
Où est votre entreprise dans ce paysage sonore ? Qu’est-ce que vous répondez aux 63% de vos salariés et aux 78% de vos consommateurs qui demandent à écouter vos podcasts ?
C'est pour ça qu'on a créé Studio Moya. 

 Studio Moya c'est quoi ?

 C'est une agence de communication audio spécialisée dans le podcast. Conception, branding, réalisation, création d'identité sonore, enregistrement, post-production et diffusion : nous vous proposons un accompagnement sur-mesure, parce que vos histoires sont uniques.

 Derrière Studio Moya, Yoann et Maryne : deux amoureux, entre eux, mais aussi du son, des relations humaines et des belles histoires. Ensemble, ils forment une équipe soudée et complémentaire, habituée du monde de l’entreprise et de ses problématiques. Yoann, c'est le musicien, compositeur et producteur pour qui le son n'a aucun secret. Maryne, c'est la marketeuse chevronnée qui cerne votre audience pour mieux chuchoter à son oreille. 

 Nous croyons au pouvoir de la voix pour créer un lien fort et authentique avec votre audience et lui transmettre vos vibrations. Nous aimons découvrir votre singularité pour mettre en ondes vos histoires. Nous concevons, créons et produisons des podcasts immersifs pour donner de l’impact à vos prises de parole, valoriser votre savoir-faire et dynamiser votre communication interne ou externe.

 Pour vous accompagner, nous avons notre propre studio d’enregistrement en région parisienne, avec une acoustique irréprochable et du matériel professionnel. Nous pouvons aussi nous déplacer chez vous grâce à une configuration mobile professionnelle et une post-production adaptée. 

 Vous êtes une marque, une entreprise ou une institution et vous souhaitez développer votre podcast ? Discutons-en : contact@studio-moya.fr

Our academy is dedicated to providing comprehensive training in music production, live concert sound, and broadcast for radio and TV. At Bali Audio Academy, we believe in hands-on training, which is why we utilize commercial studios and concert venues for practical sessions in music production and live concerts. This allows our students to gain real-life experience and develop essential skills in a professional environment.
Bali offers a multitude of live music venues offering many internship possibilities, ensuring our students who are also performers, such as musicians or DJs, have opportunities to make valuable contacts and showcase their talent in front of live audiences. We understand the importance of networking and strive to provide avenues for growth and exposure.

To enrich our curriculum, we organize four master classes and workshops annually, featuring distinguished guest speakers who are undisputed experts in their respective fields. This exposure to industry professionals gives our students valuable insights and keeps them updated with the latest trends and techniques.
We offer accommodation to our students in one of comfortable rooms in one of our villas. 

Students staying with us will also have access to relaxing facilities such as a fully equipped gym and swimming pools, ensuring a well-rounded experience during their time at the academy.

Name: Westpoint Studios
Description:
Westpoint Studios is one of the best boutique recording studios in London and has been at the cutting edge of music creativity for the last 20 years.

Also known as one of the leading choices for music producers and top artists, Westpoint Studios' client list includes the likes of: Dave Stewart, Jeff Beck, Tom Jones, Primal Scream, Simply Red, Seal, Bjork, Kylie Minogue, Take That, La Roux, Pet Shop Boys and many more. Recent Acts include: Ben Howard, Scott Walker, Sunn O))), Mika, Ed Harcourt, The Kooks, Sheppard, Frank Ocean & Sampha.

Precision built by the crème de la crème of acoustic design, 'Recording Architecture', the studio is a unique blend of state-of-the-art recording facilities combined with a daring white interior design. Natural light floods the 22-foot control room through tall frosted glass windows and is made homely by the relaxed feel and chill out zones in every room.

At the centre of Westpoint's control room is the purebred SSL 48 track 4K G Series and the highly acclaimed ATC SCM 200 monitoring system for a listening experience recommended by all who have had the pleasure of experiencing it. For multi-track recording we have the latest Pro Tools HDX system with a staggering 64 i/o via apogee symphony converters. Add to this over 100 balanced tie lines for you to record in any room (yes even the kitchen!) and it's easy to see why even clients with the most complex of sessions find it a synch to set up effortlessly into our facilities.

Westpoint's striking interior lends itself to a creative vibe from the moment you enter.

Name: Rupert Street Recording
Description:
Rupert Street Recording is a state-of-the-art recording studio based in Waterloo, Canada, built by musicians for musicians. Designed to inspire creativity and deliver world-class results, our facility combines the warmth of vintage analog gear with the precision of modern digital tools.

From Dolby Atmos mixing and immersive audio experiences to full-service recording, mixing, mastering, and video production, we provide artists, producers, and creators with the resources to bring their vision to life. Our gear library features one of the most complete collections of vintage microphones, tape machines, keyboards, guitars, and outboard gear in the country, giving every project the tone, depth, and character it deserves.

At the heart of RSR is a team of industry veterans, including award-winning producer and mixer Olle Romo, whose credits span Shania Twain, Lady Gaga, Morgan Wallen, and Eurythmics. With acoustically tuned rooms, cutting-edge technology, and a welcoming environment, we’re proud to be a creative home for both established and emerging artists.

Name: LiSem Recordings
Description:
Daniel Kobialka’s sometimes non-traditional approach to the classical violin idiom was the catalyst for what would become LiSem Recordings. Founded in California in the late 70s, LiSem quickly established itself as a leader in the New Age music movement. A majority of the early recordings saw Daniel utilizing the violin as a conduit for healing and meditation, sometimes venturing off into the avant-garde. As the years progressed, so did the tastes of Daniel and listeners. Guest artists soon joined Daniel to record releases that covered everything from the pops, to jazz, and even bluegrass. LiSem eventually relocated operations from California to Texas, where Daniel continued to compose and record until his death in early 2021. 

Today, LiSem continues to share and usher Daniel’s musical vision.

Nuestra misión:
Impulsar el talento musical con un mensaje cristiano auténtico, ofreciendo a la audiencia canciones que toquen el corazón y eleven el espíritu. A través de producciones de alta calidad y presentaciones en vivo, buscamos conectar a las personas con un propósito más profundo.

Name: east broad records
Description:
East Broad Records is an independent record label founded on April 1, 2021, with one simple but radical belief: making art matters—no matter what.

After decades of writing songs, performing, and building a successful digital marketing agency, I launched East Broad Records to create the label I wish had existed when I was younger. One that sees the value in great songwriting, even if it doesn’t fit mainstream definitions of marketability. One that champions artists who are often overlooked—because they’re too queer, too old, too weird, too honest, not "cool" enough, or their music doesn't fit a corporate mold.

We support singer-songwriters and independent artists who may never land a major label deal—but whose work deserves to be heard. Our model centers on fair, transparent, and artist-first deals: often 50/50 splits, no debt, no advances, and sometimes no cash at all—just real support, mentorship, and meaningful collaboration.

What drives us is the magic of the creative process—especially that transformation from a rough "on the couch" demo to a fully produced studio recording. That’s the work we love most: helping artists take their songs to the next level and release them into the world.

In 2026, we’re launching a monthly song contest to encourage artists of all backgrounds to keep creating. Because success isn't just about going viral or getting rich—it’s about making the art that’s inside you. It's never too late, and you're never too much.

If you've ever been told this—East Broad Records is for you. We're here to help artists keep going, keep growing, and keep releasing their songs no matter what.

Name: Quiet Please Recording
Description:
Quiet Please Recording is a magical recording studio in Greenwood neighborhood of North Seattle.  We offer professional audio production and recording services.  

The studio is set up to provide musicians and bands with a classic recording studio experience.  With the perfect marriage of vintage gear and cutting edge modern equipment and software, we have the tools to get the job done right and sounding beautiful.  We like to start with recording full bands live when we can, and then move on to overdubs from there.  We are passionate about getting great sounds.  Recording, editing, mixing, and mastering,.. we do it all here at Quiet Please Recording.  

In addition to producing records with local artists and musicians, we also produce audio books, and voice-over production services for film, TV, and radio.  Are you looking for other audio production services such as ADR or Foley, give us a call, we would love to help.  

One of the unique aspects of Quiet Please Recording is our collection of incredible microphones and vintage tape machines.  We can actually make a record without ever turning on a computer, like it's 1978, ... if you wanted to.  In fact, we are the only studio in the Seattle area with an Endless Analog CLASP system, allowing us to record sessions to tape and digitize into Pro Tools directly from tape in real time.  It is truly magical.  

Quiet Please Recording has been in business serving the Seattle area since 2013, but we, as producers and engineers,  have been in the business doing this work for decades. We would love to lend our experience and skills to your next project.  

Special attention has been paid to the vibe of the studio so that everyone from all walks of life will be comfortable working here.  We are a safe space and uphold respect, integrity, and kindness for everyone we work with.  

Give us a call.  Let's make a record!    

Thank you for taking the time to read this.  

Sincerely, 
-John Metzler

Vid Cousins
Co-Founder, Chief Engineer

With a Masters in Audio Production from Westminster University (UK) and extensive international experience in Sound Engineering (live and in-studio), Production, Composition and Performance over the last 20 years, Vid brings a balanced perspective towards finding and achieving one's sound. His broad electro-acoustic understanding, and situation-specific, problem-solving capabilities have been sought out by many of the music industry's most cutting edge producers and performing artists.

Vid’s studio production career began in the UK in 1995 as an assistant engineer at The Dairy recording studios in Brixton, London. The varied projects at this establishment ranged from Real World artist recordings through to the mix production for Deep Purple for their Live in Europe 1996 album. His work later held him in such positions as studio technician at the University of Westminster's 9-studio recording facility and Head Technician at SubZer0 studios in South London. 

His experience as a musician, in addition to his production work in both the studio and live arena, has given him a balanced understanding of the varying challenges an artist may face in the creation of his or her sound.

Name: Windmill Records LTD
Description:
Windmill Records LTD is (and has been for 50 years) the distinguished home of the New York-founded, L.A.-based Pop-Rock musical act known as MIRROUR. 

So then, who is MIRROUR, really?

A great band that has produced original music rooted in diverse variety - in song-crafting styles, musicianship and vocal prowess. It has been said that they've become the modern leaders of the sound revolution that began in the mid-1960's and have picked up where other iconic 1960's bands left off ... and, you know, this reviewer tends to agree with them! Today they are well ahead of the curve, producing superb sounds in dynamic recordings that are fresh and vibrant. Never dated. Never known or viewed as a 'cover band', they are extraordinarily original in EVERYTHING they choose to produce.

Biography

MIRROUR has been making music together since 1966 and, although no longer touring, continue to produce new meaningful, relevant material that stands alone in its class ... Although it's been said that their music defies definition (and, as such we won't put a label on it), their very name does have a dictionary-esque delineation:

*mirrour (noun)
/ˈmɪrə(r)/; /ˈmɪrər/ *noun: Archaic spelling of mirror: smooth, reflective surface. Object, person, or event that reflects or gives a picture of another

"Archaic” (excuse me but, The Lads aren't really THAT old) or not, their music really is "smooth" and "reflective" and does, in fact, very often "give a picture of another ..."  That said, their extreme diversity in song-crafting styles ... words, ideas, music and sonics, their musicianship and vocal prowess, elevate them to ‘Top of Class’ as they produce superb sounds in dynamic recordings that are fresh and vibrant every time ... they are extraordinarily original in EVERYTHING they choose to produce. Three styles; three voices; endless creativity and entertainment! 

Recommendation? 

Tune in! Listen to as much Mirrour as you can - you will NEVER be disappointed.

Description:
Somos uma gravadora musical que ajudará artistas a desenvolverem a sua auto-gestão artística com foco na distribuição de músicas nas plataformas digitais. Fomos desenvolvido para oferecer autonomia, flexibilidade e liberdade aos artistas. Atuamos no processo de planejamento de seus lançamentos músicas, desde o registro de suas músicas junto ao ECAD até aos lançamentos das músicas nas plataformas de streaming, com um plano de gestão e marketing para que possam atuar de forma rentável nesse universo digital. Nossa principal ferramenta é a transparência, tanto na atitude quanto no diálogo. Temos a missão de fazer o artista independente, ser independente de verdade, de forma prática e organizada com todo suporte para planejar e executar sua gestão e produzir o seu próprio show. Levar inclusão é nossa missão, provocar aqueles que por algum motivo se jugam incapazes de fazer da sua música, o seu verdadeiro negócio. Sobretudo com relação ao início da carreira e todas as frentes em que ele precisa atuar, como marketing e diretos autorais. O “artista” só entenderá tudo isso através da informação e, esse é o nosso principal serviço, dar conhecimento para atingir o sucesso. Nossos valores tem com base muita ética, compromisso e honestidade. Ter clareza dos nossos valores, nos ajuda a propagar de forma exponencial o que acreditamos acima de qualquer outra coisa, ser do bem, isso é nossa fonte de energia. Para nós, fator crucial é entregar além do combinado, nos doamos e entregamos muito, entendemos que a grandeza do resultado está no detalhe da entrega. Temos paixão e a certeza que estamos fazendo o que gostamos e, por isso estaremos sempre fazendo mais, com muita dinâmica e sagacidade. Todo nosso propósito é agregar valor e visibilidade juntos aos artistas, ir além, romper barreiras, conectar a música com todo o universo e de forma rentável. Para nós não é só música, é negócio também.

Somos música, gestão e informação.

Name: MPS-Studio e.V.
Description:
Das MPS-Studio ist ein lebendiges Denkmal. Der erstklassige Klang der Räume und Aufnahmetechnik haben diesem historischen Ort einen weltweit legendären Ruf eingebracht, nicht nur im Bereich Jazz, sondern auch Klassik, Weltmusik und Avantgarde.

Viele internationale Musiker*innen haben in diesem Studio hochkarätige Aufnahmen gemacht: Bill Evans, Oscar Peterson, Joachim Kühn, Lee Konitz, Friedrich Gulda, George Duke, Singers Unlimited, Dave Pike Set, Hans Koller, Cecil Taylor, Albert Mangelsdorff, Mark Murphy, Volker Kriegel, Jean Luc-Ponty, Baden Powell, John Taylor, Wolfgang Dauner, Charly Antolini und viele andere.

Most Perfect sound:
Mit sehr viel Platz im Aufnahmeraum für Studioproduktionen und einem separaten Schlagzeugraum verfügt das MPS-Studio über genug Fläche für professionelle Tonaufnahmen. Der große Regieraum beherbergt nach wie vor die analoge Studiotechnik wie auch die Möglichkeit der digitalen Aufnahme. Ein Aufenthaltsbereich und eine Teeküche/Bar runden die Räumlichkeiten des Studios ab und bieten eine außergewöhnliche, gastfreundliche Atmosphäre an diesem besonderen historischen Ort. 

 
Bösendorfer Grand Imperial:
Für exklusive Pianoaufnahmen steht seit 1977 der legendäre Bösendorfer Grand Imperial Konzertflügel zur Verfügung, der einen tollen expressionistischen Klang erzeugt. Von Friedrich Gulda persönlich ausgesucht, war es überhaupt nicht einfach das über eine halbe Tonne schwere Instrument ins Studio zu bekommen, Teile des Treppenhauses mussten dafür abgebaut werden. Der Grand Imperial verfügt über 5 zusätzliche Tasten und ein ganz tiefes Klangspektrum. Wer diesen Flügel spielen oder hören durfte wird es nicht vergessen. Monty Alexander oder Cecil Taylor gehörten auch zu den Auserwählten.

Name: Boholoholo
Description:
Boholoholo is the official publishing label for the music of internationally acclaimed South African composer and conductor, Franco Prinsloo. As the creative hub for Prinsloo's award-winning compositions, Boholoholo encompasses a diverse range of works, including choral masterpieces, vocal compositions, and music for theatre and film.

Through Boholoholo, Franco Prinsloo's unique musical vision is brought to life, reaching audiences worldwide. The label serves as the publishing home for his extensive catalogue, which includes works performed by renowned ensembles like the Vox Chamber Choir, and commissions from prestigious groups such as The King's Singers.

Boholoholo is dedicated to:

Publishing Excellence: Ensuring the highest quality publication and distribution of Franco Prinsloo's musical works.

Artistic Vision: Promoting and preserving the innovative and culturally rich compositions of Franco Prinsloo.

Global Reach: Making Prinsloo's music accessible to performers and listeners around the world.

Supporting South African Music: Fostering the growth and recognition of South African classical music on the international stage.

Boholoholo is the foundation through which the sounds and musical artistry of Franco Prinsloo are shared with the world.
