Musikworkshops für Kinder und Jugendliche werden ebenfalls deutschlandweit in Kooperation mit Städten, Schulen und Freizeitzentren angeboten.

A community of artists, producers, and music lovers, Radio Gurl Records believes in fostering collaboration and providing a platform for artists to connect and create together. From avant-garde electronica to bedroom pop, from ambient dreamscapes to otherworldly folk, our artists break free from the constraints of convention to create music that challenges, intrigues, and captivates.

Radio Gurl Records believes in the power of diverse sonic expressions, and is dedicated to discovering and nurturing emerging artists whose music transcends boundaries and challenges the status quo.

Tune out all that monoculture noise, and tune in to Radio Gurl Records.

Name: Soproq
Description:
Soproq is a not-for-profit collective rights management organization for makers of sound recordings and music videos. The organization collects and distributes royalties from the public performance and reproduction of sound recordings and music videos in its repertoire, as well as the royalties from the private copying regime.

It also negotiates with music supply services and grants general licenses for the use of titles in its repertoire.

Soproq’s repertoire includes nearly 2,5 million track titles belonging to more than 5,2000 rights owners from Quebec, from other provinces in Canada and from other countries: record labels, independent artists, distributors, associations, foreign collectives, etc.

Name: GECKO // audiogecko.com
Description: Gecko is a leading European audio digitization and restoration company, based near Paris, France. From delaminated lacquer disc transfer to mass cassette digitization, from 24-track session tape preservation to 1/4" mono tape digital audio restoration, we do it all whatever the age of the support, and we do it the right way. The 10 studios in our 500m facility are fully equipped with Studer tape machines, EMT turntables and the best outboard audio devices to ensure faithful playback and digitization of any analog format. Difficult carriers such as instantaneous discs or sticky-shed-syndrom tapes are part of our daily job routine. We also have the required equipment and skills to transfer any digital audio format, including digital multi-track tapes . Our digital audio restoration and enhancement engineers master the Cedar Cambridge system and numerous other digital tools at hand. From automatic batch enhancement processes to ultra-precise manual audio restoration and mastering, we are ready to satisfy any budget and requirement. The optimization of our processes has been refined through our 10 years of experience. Our databasing and workflow management is highly flexible and efficient. We have built our reputation in Europe on our exceptionally high pass/fail ratio at our clients’ quality control tests. This is because we have developed a strict in-house Quality Control procedure.

Name: Profisprecherin - Dorothea Anzinger
Description:
Künstliche Stimmen sind in aller Munde. 
Nur nicht in meinem. 
Meine Stimme ist echt. Meine Emotionen auch.
Und genau deshalb buchen mich Tonstudios, Produktionsfirmen und Agenturen als Synchronschauspielerin. 
Weil sie wissen, dass nur eine menschliche Stimme eine Botschaft präzise mitten ins Herz und Hirn der Zuhörenden transportiert. 
Meine Stimme macht Ihre Texte lebendig, menschlich und spürbar. 
Damit Ihre Botschaft dort ankommt, wo sie hingehört. 
In den Herzen und Köpfen Ihrer Kunden.

Description:
Musica Lavica Records, etichetta discografica indipendente: musica esplosiva, dirompente, generata nel cuore nero della Sicilia, capace di rinnovare, proporre e sviluppare nuovi modi di pensare, produrre, comunicare, promuovere e gestire progetti artistici e musicali che abbiano come fine ultimo l’alta qualità musicale proposta.
Musica Lavica Records guarda al futuro con pragmatismo e tanta creatività, con l’obiettivo di dar vita sempre a nuove forme di arte, che sappiano abbracciare settori musicali diversi, attraverso un’attenta ricerca artistica, originale e innovativa (musica cantautorale, musica classica, musica strumentale, ambient, pop, pop-rock, world music, musica a supporto di testi poetici, colonne sonore per il teatro e per il cinema).
All’avanguardia e al passo con i tempi, Musica Lavica Records affianca gli artisti in un percorso di crescita fino a far nascere un vero e proprio prodotto discografico professionale, curando ogni minimo aspetto della produzione artistica e musicale, del marketing e della promozione, fino alla distribuzione globale.
Obiettivo ultimo è quello di fare crescere nuovi talenti, raggiungendo importanti traguardi.
Musica Lavica si pone nel mercato musicale con un’impostazione ibrida in cui la produzione del disco non è il fine ultimo, ma una strategia di successo del progetto a cui si sta lavorando.
Musica Lavica, quindi, concentra la propria attenzione sulla qualità dei progetti, lavorando sulle capacità compositive, interpretative, tecniche e timbriche dell’artista, con passione, dedizione e cura per i dettagli.

SONIC ID är grundat av Martin Roos och han har de senaste 10 åren arbetat som VD på Destination Eskilstuna där har han haft ansvar för frågor kring platsattraktion, varumärke, evenemang och besöksnäring. 

Martin Roos har över 20 års erfarenhet från musikbranschen och har bland annat jobbat på Sonet Grammofon, Sony Music och var under 17 år Kents manager. Han är musikvetare med en kandidatexamen i musik- och ljuddesign inom huvudområdet musikvetenskap. 

Martin är sedan 2020 Ordförande i Svensk Live samt från 2022 ledamot Uppsala Kultur & Kongress kreativa råd.

”Sonic Branding är ett holistiskt synsätt på ett 
varumärkes användning av musik och ljud

Name: Polen Records
Description:
Polen Records is a Colombian record label based in Bogota, that since 2006 seeks to give voice to an independent Latin-American sound. It began as a risky but refreshing idea with the intention of releasing music that did not seem to have room in the market. Polen's first release was Bajotierra's Los Días Adelante (2006), followed by Bomba Estéreo's debut EP, Vol.1, and Chocquibtown's debut LP, Somos Pacífico.
Our catalogue exposes the artistic line we seek to maintain and help create, revealing the multicultural identity of our country.
At Polen Records we admire and appreciate the music our artists create and understand our job as a collective effort to get this music to the widest audience possible.

Polen Records es un sello discográfico colombiano con sede en Bogotá, que desde 2006 busca dar voz a un sonido independiente latinoamericano. Comenzó como una idea arriesgada pero refrescante con la intención de publicar música que parecía no tener cabida en el mercado. El primer lanzamiento de Polen fue Los Días Adelante (2006) de Bajotierra, seguido por el EP debut de Bomba Estéreo, Vol.1, y el album debut de Chocquibtown, Somos Pacífico.
Nuestro catálogo expone una línea artística que buscamos mantener y ayudar a crear, revelando la identidad multicultural de nuestro país.
En Polen Records admiramos y apreciamos la música que crean nuestros artistas y entendemos nuestro trabajo como un esfuerzo colectivo para hacer llegar esta música al mayor público posible.

Le principe de l'acoustique du studio, est celui de LEDE (Live-End Dead-End) conçu par Don Devis en  1978. Un principe qui a fait ces preuves dans les plus grands studios du monde.

Depuis 1993, je parcours les univers musicaux avec passion. J'ai réalisé un grand nombre de prestations live et participé à de nombreuses productions. Name: Edition Records
Description:
Edition was founded in 2008 by the pianist and composer Dave Stapleton on two principles: to share music with a clear message and to do so in a bold way. Today, Edition is a record label sitting at the centre of the global music scene, working with the same values it set out with, almost 15 years ago. Having evolved from a cottage industry and self-releasing artist based label, Edition has built a deep authenticity and bold identity to its work with empathy and passion at its core. Edition exists to amplify its artists’ vision under two distinct labels;

Edition Records – a leading, forward thinking and boundary pushing Jazz label.
E2 Music – a category defying, alternative label unified by mood and emotion.

“We work with artists who share a quality of intent and a vision with a drive and commitment to their Art. That’s what really excites us. They are deeply committed to finding their voice and a sound that’s uniquely theirs. They all share this quality, deeply. No compromises. They’re authentic masters of their instrument, on a lifelong pursuit to create. Our goal is to provide the link and connection between their Art and their audiences, wherever they are and however they’re listening”. Dave Stapleton

Name: deepbeep
Description:
O algoritmo é um espelho. A curadoria humana é uma janela.

O deepbeep é essa curadoria em prática: uma plataforma de conversas profundas e playlists pessoais que nascem da escuta. Contra a velocidade e as fórmulas da cultura digital, somos dedicados ao processo. Celebramos o olhar individual, o artesanal e o intuitivo.

Não buscamos o fato superficial. Buscamos a filosofia, o universo íntimo da criação. Nossa curadoria investiga o ofício do artista e a sua assinatura única no mundo. Questionamos o processo criativo, o seu propósito e como tudo isso dialoga com o agora. Nossas playlists não são listas automáticas. São um exercício criativo, o artefato desse diálogo.

Esta é a nossa resposta à cultura da velocidade. Um convite à escuta atenta.

O Estúdio deepbeep
Acreditamos que marcas também podem ser curadoras. A mesma sensibilidade e rigor editorial que aplicamos ao nosso conteúdo são a base de nossos projetos especiais. Ajudamos marcas a construir relevância cultural e a encontrar uma voz autêntica, longe das fórmulas. Acreditamos no diálogo, não apenas no “conteúdo”. Na relevância, não apenas no “buzz”.

Nossas frentes de trabalho incluem:

Curadoria Cultural e Musical: Criamos a identidade sonora para marcas, de playlists a podcasts e ativações.

Estratégia Editorial (Brand Studio): Desenvolvemos linhas editoriais, manifestos e estratégias de conteúdo que conectam marcas à cultura.

Conexões e Parcerias: Desenhamos e executamos parcerias entre marcas e os artistas, pensadores e movimentos certos.

Para conversar sobre um projeto, escreva para falecom@deepbeep.com.br

Privacy Policy for Saltman Audio Lab on LinkedIn

At Saltman Audio Lab, we respect your privacy. We only collect personal data when you voluntarily provide it (e.g., through direct messages or comments). This may include your name, job title, and contact details.

Name: Stonecutter Recording Studios
Description:
Stonecutter Recording Studios, located in the South Loop of Chicago, is a recording facility providing world class services in music recording, mixing, mastering, marketing and production. Branching off as an independent label, Stonecutter Records was formed and is currently led by Grammy-nominated producer and engineer, Chris Steinmetz. We strive to create artists' visions and  their masterpieces. Our first priority is the always the artist. With their goals in mind, Stonecutter Recording Studios provides accommodations for all artist needs to the best of our ability. 

CUT THROUGH THE NOISE-REACH FOR HIGHER GROUND!
With some of the most sought after musical instruments, amplifiers, and recording equipment paired with our highly experienced and skilled production team, we will bring out the best in your recordings or project. Our amazing sounding studio space is equipped with a fully loaded Pro Tools HD system, Vintage Neve 1073s and a desirable collection of both modern and vintage gear. In addition, our large live room has 25ft. high ceilings and a unique surface that allows for a wide array of unique acoustics.

WHY STONECUTTER
We understand how important the process of developing your sounds and presence are as a musician, which is why we are going to be there at every step of the recording process from pre-production to mastering, and then finally to marketing your band and the finished product. Our owner and producer, Chris Steinmetz, has accrued a wealth of production knowledge, culminating an assortment of multi-platinum records. By working with Stonecutter Studios, you will be provided with a highly skilled and objective ear, along with the energy and direction your band needs. We strive to provide these services to musicians in all stages of their career.

Check out Chris’s extensive catalog and clientele here: http://www.stonecutterstudios.com/clients/

Name: Will Nebreda Producer
Description:
I'm Will Nebreda, a freelance music producer, recording & mixing engineer with 7 years of experience in the field. Beyond this, I have been a musician for over 11 years, with extensive experience in both performance and composition. Having graduated with a First-Class BA(Hons) in Music: Popular Music & Recording at the University of Salford, I am now studying an MA in Creative Music Technology at the same University (graduating in 2027). 

I am involved with two Manchester-based bands: 'Sietch', an alt-rock band for which I compose, perform (guitars & backing vocals), produce, and manage; 'Leila's Dream', a psychedelic folk collective for which I perform on bass and have some creative input. With these two projects, I am deeply involved in Manchester's rich and diverse music scene, with an understanding of just what it is like being a musician/artist in today's scene. 

One thing I can empathise with, being a musician and creative first and foremost, is the level of trust it takes for an artist when handing the baton over to a producer for their songs to be worked into a finished track. From speaking with other musicians, along with my own experiences, all too often the final product falls short of the mark: either in quality, or because the producer didn't reflect the artist's vision accurately. Through my work as a producer, while ensuring high-quality technical practice, I place particular focus and attention on aligning my work with the artist's creative vision for a given project.

No Music - Where Innovation Meets Music.

Ogni episodio vi porterà a conoscere una figura femminile straordinaria che ha sfidato le convenzioni, superato gli ostacoli e ha avuto un impatto significativo nel suo campo.
Unisciti a noi mentre esploriamo le vite e le realizzazioni di donne influenti in ambito scientifico, politico, artistico, imprenditoriale e sociale. Sarà un viaggio avvincente attraverso le epoche e i continenti, alla scoperta di storie di forza, resilienza e successo.

Se sei pronto o pronta a essere ispirato o ispirata e a scoprire il potenziale illimitato delle donne nel cambiare il mondo, abbonati ora a “Women’s Voice” su tutte le principali piattaforme di podcast. Non perdere l’opportunità di essere parte di questa straordinaria narrazione!

Name: The Sound Sculptor
Description:
The Sound Sculptor isn't just a company, it's a community. 

We're a passionate collective dedicated to empowering aspiring artists to transform their creative visions into captivating soundscapes. Whether you're a musician yearning to craft your next masterpiece, a filmmaker seeking the perfect soundscape, or a budding sound designer itching to leave your sonic mark, we believe everyone has the potential to be a sound sculptor.

Building Your Home Studio: The Foundation of Your Sonic Dreamscape. 

We understand the allure of a professional recording studio – the pristine equipment, the dedicated acoustics, the air of creative possibility. But what if we told you that creating incredible soundscapes could be achieved within the comfort of your own home?  Here at The Sound Sculptor, we guide you through every step of building your dream home studio, from selecting the right gear to mastering the art of acoustic treatment.  We believe in breaking down barriers and making sonic creation accessible, empowering you to turn any room into a haven for sonic exploration.

The Sound Sanctuary Course: Unveiling the Secrets of Sound Sculpting

Our flagship program, "The Sound Sanctuary," is more than just a course; it's an immersive journey into the world of sound creation. We don't just teach you how to build a home recording studio – we demystify the very essence of sound, guiding you on how to capture, manipulate, and sculpt it into your artistic vision.

 Led by industry veterans who have honed their craft in the trenches, "The Sound Sanctuary" equips you with the knowledge, techniques, and creative confidence to turn your sonic dreams into a reality.

Beyond the Technical: Cultivating Your Sonic Identity

Building a home studio is only the first step. At The Sound Sculptor, we believe that sound sculpting is an art form, and every artist has a unique voice.

Name: Muse Foundry LLC
Description:
Muse Foundry brings people back to music through offline distribution.

We're building a quarterly record label that ships vinyl directly to subscribers. There are no algorithms, no streaming platforms. Just music born of real time and presence, created through ungriddified recording practices and distributed as physical artifacts.

Our artists retain creative control and receive transparent, meaningful royalties. 

Each release comes with a Certificate of Embodied Production, ensuring the music preserves human timing, authentic expression, and the ineffable elements that give music its capacity to teach us how to be together.

Founded on the belief that music carries knowledge words cannot reach, we create conditions for music to be encountered, not consumed. Where presence matters more than playlist position.

The future of music is offline.

Specjalizujemy się w najwyższej jakości nagraniach w wybranej przez Ciebie lokalizacji - w studio lub poza nim.

Korzystamy z technologii Dolby Atmos, aby dostarczyć Ci dźwiękowe doznania na najwyższym poziomie.

Zapraszamy do współpracy zespoły jazzowe, folkowe, orkiestry symfoniczne, dęte, chóry i solistów. Nasza pasja do doskonałego brzmienia sprawi, że Twoje nagrania będą unikalne.

W obszarze nagrań lektorskich współpracujemy z renomowanymi wydawnictwami, specjalizując się w nagrywaniu tekstów do nauki języków obcych oraz audiobooków. Dysponujemy bazą głosów native speakerów z Niemiec, Wielkiej Brytanii, Rosji i Polski.

Co możemy dla Ciebie zrobić? Oferujemy kompleksowe usługi dźwiękowe, począwszy od mobilnych nagrań muzycznych przez profesjonalne nagrania lektorskie aż po miksy Dolby Amos. Jeśli poszukujesz brzmienia najwyższej jakości, jesteśmy gotowi sprostać Twoim oczekiwaniom.

Name: SoundsClean
Description:
When it comes to audio evidence, nothing is more important than the Truth – and we can help reveal that truth.

Audio can provide crucial evidence that cannot be disputed.  Sometimes though, the truth that needs to be revealed can be hidden behind static, background noises, gaps in the recording, and other issues.

At Sounds Clean we believe that the truth is in there, no matter what might be compromising your recording. We specialize in noise, allowing us to bring the most intensive skills and services to address your audio enhancement needs.
At Sounds Clean we use state of the art system to recover unintelligible speech and other sounds from poorly recorded media and high noise environment. We offer our services to anyone requiring it. 

Audio samples: https://www.youtube.com/@soundsclean2981

Audio enhancement starts with an audio filtering process that helps improve a recording’s clarity without damaging its authenticity. Above all, the goal of the sound enhancement service is to better hear dialogue by removing distracting noise. 

For video recordings, the enhanced audio can be edited back to your original video. 

Transcription & rush service available.

Our service is especially useful if you have a recording that has significant background noise such as; hums, electrical interference, air conditioners, tape hiss, street noise, etc., or if you would like a specific sound or voice isolated or removed. We clarify audio, so it can be transcribed easier into a legible depiction of what was recorded or said.

Our artists retain creative control and receive transparent, meaningful royalties. 

Each release comes with a Certificate of Embodied Production, ensuring the music preserves human timing, authentic expression, and the ineffable elements that give music its capacity to teach us how to be together.

Founded on the belief that music carries knowledge words cannot reach, we create conditions for music to be encountered, not consumed. Where presence matters more than playlist position.

The future of music is offline.

Name: The Arch Recording Studio
Description:
Designed by world-renowned and respected acoustician John H. Brandt, The Arch Recording Studio boasts a stunning 90m2 tracking room, adjoining isolation booth and a meticulously crafted control room, set in a picturesque former Methodist Chapel that has stood since 1880.

The tracking room has ample space to host full live band recordings, string ensembles, jazz orchestras and features 5m high ceilings, with the original arch beams and architecture still visible.

The isolation booth is perfectly suited to vocalists, guitars, voiceover work and anything which requires a tighter sound.

Featuring plenty of natural daylight, our well-ventilated, air-conditioned recording studio provides an acoustically flexible space to inspire, with room to room isolation and extensive diffusion, diffraction and bass trapping, all designed for the perfect creative environment.

Rates:

As client requirements tend to vary, rates are calculated on a per project basis.  The studio can be hired out either with one of our in-house engineers, or dry hired should you wish to bring in your own 
engineer/producer and subject to prior approval.

Full terms and conditions will be provided as part of your booking, including deposit requirements and payment options.

We endeavour to provide good access to all - if you are a musical or charitable organisation interested in working with The Arch Recording Studio, please contact us to discuss further.

Name: Hot Milk Studio
Description:
A new recording studio located in a serene location in northern Berlin, we offer all services from songwriting to pre-production, session musicians and arrangers, to the actual recording, mixing, and mastering of your record. We also do voice actor and audio book recording, vocal tuning, drum editing, sound design, audio restoration and denoising. As an additional service, we can also film your sessions at the studio.

Our spacious daylit studio contains three dedicated tracking rooms, a control room, a lounge area, bathroom, kitchen and a storage room with a total of 130 sqm and 4m high ceilings. We have 3 large windows offering full daylight into the space. Our control room and tracking rooms have been designed for optimum acoustics and sound fantastic! Our main room boasts a perfectly maintained Yamaha G5 grand piano (arriving Sept. 14, 2023) and a warm sounding Seiler upright piano. We also have a large selection of top-brand drums, cymbals and amps.

CONTROL ROOM
The bright and spacious control room is optimised for mixing and recording. The control room also offers direct sightlines to the three tracking rooms, so that up to four groups of performers can perform sonically isolated while still in visual contact. A studio with a great vibe!

With our hybrid setup, we record through a range of top preamps into our DAW of choice, Steinberg Cubase. We also utilize a mixture of plugins and hardware during the mixing process to offer you the best of both worlds.

3 TRACKING ROOMS
The three adjoining tracking rooms can easily accommodate 3 to 12 musicians and offers excellent sight lines between the rooms and into the control room. We offer a broad range of outstanding drum kits, amps, guitars, basses and various keyboards.

A wide selection of top microphones (Neumann, Gefell, beyerdynamic etc.) and a wide range of killer outboard audio equipment ensures top-tier signal paths so that you have everything you need for an outstanding recording experience.

Ultimately, at Crowd Control Records, we are driven by our unwavering passion for music, our unwavering belief in the transformative power of art, and our unwavering commitment to our artists.

Name: Beats By Byrd, LLC
Description:
Beats By Byrd, whose real name is Ernest Byrd, is a prominent music producer known for his innovative contributions to the hip-hop and R&B genres. With a career spanning over a decade, Byrd has earned a reputation for his versatile production style, blending classic and contemporary elements to create unique, chart-topping tracks.

Byrd's journey into music production began in his teenage years, experimenting with beat-making software and honing his skills in local studios. His breakthrough came when he produced several tracks for emerging artists in his hometown of Indianapolis, In. which quickly garnered attention in the music industry.

Over the years, Beats By Byrd has collaborated with a wide range of artists, from underground talents to mainstream superstars, earning critical acclaim and commercial success. 

Known for his meticulous attention to detail and a deep understanding of musical trends, Byrd continues to push the boundaries of music production. His work not only influences current sounds but also sets new standards for aspiring producers. Whether in the studio cooking up songs or engineering, Beats By Byrd remains a significant force in shaping the future of hip-hop and R&B music.

Name: Aerocade Music Inc
Description:
Aerocade Music is an independent record label seeking to add exciting, modern, and even revolutionary perspectives to the contemporary classical, experimental, and electronic music landscape. To achieve this goal, Aerocade almost exclusively represents West Coast musicians with dynamic backgrounds. Having gathered a deep artistic roster, Aerocade Music label is celebrated for “quality,” “superb programming,” and “first-rate performances”. (Fanfare Magazine)

Since its founding in 2015 by veteran contemporary flutist Meerenai Shim, Aerocade has released 13 albums. Aerocade believes that new music suffers not from an unequal talent pool, but from unequal representation. Thus, the label's artists typically have backgrounds underrepresented in geography, demographics, or both. 

A variety of media outlets have taken notice of Aerocade’s bold programming, including I Care If You Listen and Fanfare Magazine. Furthermore, albums released on the Aerocade label have received praise from music journalists both in the UK and across North America, including New York Music Daily, The Wire magazine, Gapplegate Classical-Modern Music Review, textura, Oregon Arts Watch, The Flute View, and Avant Music News, among others, and have also earned nods on numerous best-of lists, including Bandcamp’s "Best of Contemporary Classical" as well as Avant Music News’ end-of-year list. Aerocade Music is based in the San Francisco Bay Area.

She's deeply involved in music industry leadership, advocacy, and mentorship through my work with The Recording Academy, the Audio Engineering Society (AES), SoundGirls.org, and the International Bluegrass Music Association (IBMA).

Name: The Daisy Corner
Description:
Meeting in 2019, Mackenzie and Olivia became college roommates, their friendship blossoming alongside the inspiration for The Daisy Corner 

Experiences  in male-dominated music spaces left them feeling defeated, but not ready to give up. As two women pursuing careers in the music industry, they  came to realize that there were women owned studios, but they were few and far in between. 

Driven by their love for art, collaborative spirit, and the need for more female-fronted creative spaces, The Daisy Corner blossomed into a full-service record label with a dedicated team.

At The Daisy Corner, we are committed to fostering a space where artists can thrive and be their best selves.  From music production and marketing to music video production, photoshoots, and album art, we offer everything you need to bring your creative vision to life.

Name: Manufaktur der Klänge
Description:
Die Manufaktur wurde 2020 von dem Essayisten, Schauspieler und Klangkünstler Boris Pietsch gegründet und entwickelt sich seitdem ständig weiter.
Der Antrieb war vor allem, die wohl schwierigste Herausforderung in der Kunst der Tonaufzeichnung zu meistern; die vitale Abbildung der puren menschlichen Stimme. Und das in ihrer ganzen Vielfalt, Fülle und unermesslichen Feinheit.
Das ist nun einmal der Klang, auf den unser Ohr am sensibelsten abgestimmt ist. Deshalb fällt hier jedes kleinste Detail so ins Gewicht.
Um die Magie der durch sie evozierten Kommunikationssphären auch in der Aufnahme möglichst spürbar zu machen, ist also auch feinste Technik, Abstimmung und viel lebendig durchdrungene Erfahrung auf vielen Ebenen gefragt.

Aber auch sonstige Klänge bekommen wir gerne vors Mikrophon und auf den Schnittplatz…

Diese Gesamtherausforderung spielerisch anzugehen, ist das Abenteuer in das wir bei MdK immer wieder freudig eintauchen.

Am liebsten konzentrieren wir uns auf das Wesentliche, schalten den Computer garnicht erst an und nehmen analog auf. (Klingt auch besser.)

Für gewisse Arbeiten sind wir selbstredend auch Digital bestens aufgestellt.

Die zeitlosen Räume-der-Arbeit die wir mit unserem theatralen know-how immer wieder neu gestalten, sind Atelier und Salon der Begegnung – auch außer Haus, für weitaus mehr als reine Klangaufzeichnung…

Name: Ultimae
Description:
Derived from the Latin "Ultimae Terrae," meaning "the furthest places," the name Ultimae reflects a profound theme of exploration. This concept is at the heart of Ultimae Records, an ambient music record label and publisher dedicated to transporting listeners to the outer edges of experience through sound and offering a space for introspection and discovery within the vastness of the mind and beyond.

In 1999, Vincent Villuis and Sandrine Gryson, also known as AES Dana and Mahiane, united over a shared passion for the immersive world of electronic music. This collaboration led to the birth of the label. Initially envisioned as a musical portal, Ultimae's mission was to explore and disseminate the diverse expressions of Ambient music far and wide through the production of records and the establishment of an online shop.

Over the years, Ultimae has expanded beyond its original scope, evolving into a multifaceted company with sound design, post-production, and mastering studios based in Lyon, France, along with professional services in publishing, music licensing, and synchronization.

We support musicians and bands as well as agencies, startups, and established companies seeking a professional and authentic sound for their brand or projects.

Name: Pro Studio Time
Description:
How We Transformed the Studio Booking Experience After a Decade of Challenges

For over ten years, we grappled with the inefficiencies and frustrations of booking professional recording studio time across the globe. Thousands of bookings later, working with a diverse range of artists, sessions, and timeframes, we knew something had to change. That's why we developed ProStudioTime, our innovative solution designed to streamline the process and enhance the experience for both artists and studio owners.

The Challenge of Studio Booking - Booking studio time used to be a cumbersome task. The endless back-and-forths, mismatched choices, and high administrative overheads made it a nightmare for artists, managers, and studios alike. Our decade-long experience in handling these inefficiencies informed the creation of ProStudioTime, a platform that addresses these challenges head-on.

Simplifying the Process with ProStudioTime - At ProStudioTime, we’ve engineered a system that simplifies studio discovery and booking. No more countless hours spent on research or dealing with the hassle of negotiating availability. Our platform provides a seamless, user-friendly interface where you can search for studios, compare detailed profiles, and communicate directly with studio owners. Whether it’s for music recording, post-production, or podcasting, we've got you covered.

Commitment to Quality - One of the key features of ProStudioTime is our commitment to quality. We collaborate exclusively with studios that meet professional standards, ensuring that every booking meets the high expectations of our users. This way, artists and producers can focus on what they do best – creating amazing content – while we handle the logistics.

What is more, it is crucial to point out how rare it is to find a place in which it is possible to produce complete movie scoring and full sound post-production, starting with music composition and dialogue editing, through full sound design, ending in surround music and re-recording mixing. Name: Abdullah Ahmed | Voice Actor
Description:
As a passionate Voiceover Actor, I bring characters to life and deliver impactful messages with versatility and precision. With more than 5 years of experience in the industry, I specialize in performing voice-over for commercial ads and dubbing activities.

My voice is known for its ability in mastering:

• Clarity and Articulation: A clear and well-articulated voice that's essential for delivering information effectively. Each word is pronounced distinctly to ensure comprehension,

• Tone and Emotion: The tone of my voice can vary depending on the context of the script. It might be authoritative, warm, enthusiastic, soothing, or any other quality that aligns with the intended message or character,

• Versatility: As a Voiceover Actor, I can adapt my voice to suit different roles and scenarios. This includes changing pitch, cadence, and style to match the requirements of the script,

• Consistency: Consistency in delivery ensures that the voice-over I perform maintains the same quality throughout the recording. This is crucial for maintaining engagement and coherence in longer scripts or projects,

• Characterization: When I deliver voice-over for characters, versatility extends to creating distinct personalities through voice alone. This may involve altering accents, speech patterns, and vocal quirks to bring characters to life,

and that's making me a go-to choice for clients seeking engaging and authentic vocal performances. I thrive on interpreting scripts and bringing a client’s vision to fruition, ensuring each project resonates with its intended audience.

Whether it’s a character in an animated series, a compelling commercial voiceover, or a soothing narration, I approach each project with creativity and professionalism.

Qualité Exceptionnelle : Nous mettons un point d'honneur à fournir des enregistrements d'une qualité sonore irréprochable. Notre matériel haut de gamme et notre expertise technique assurent un résultat professionnel.

Expertise artistique : Notre équipe est composée de passionnés de musique, et nous croyons en la puissance de l'expression artistique. Nous vous soutenons dans votre démarche créative et vous aidons à réaliser votre vision musicale.

Name: CBH-MUSIC
Description:
CBH MUSIC nasce dall'eperienza di Urania Records, etichetta indipendente italiana che opera nella musica classica dal 1998, con un catalogo fisico di oltre 500 titoli, prodotti in questi 25 anni. CBH MUSIC ha come obiettivo il trasferire digitalmente nelle più alte risoluzioni (DSD e Hi-Res AUDIO), partendo dai nostri master analogici, i grandi titoli storici dei grandi interpreti e delle grandi registrazioni della musica classica. La nostra produzione comprende registrazioni storiche di musica strumentale e operistica. CBH MUSIC presta particolare attenzione ai più grandi direttori e interpreti del Novecento e propone registrazioni rare o inedite.

Tutte le nostre collezioni storiche presentano registrazioni analogiche di alta qualità, restaurate con un metodo che pur preservando la naturalezza del suono della sorgente, recupera pienamente la bellezza della registrazione originale. Ciascuna delle tecniche del processo di trascrizione apporta contributi importanti e udibili alla qualità del segnale digitale codificato. Tutto questo crea una magia che produce una qualità audio incredibilmente buona che può essere sentita su qualsiasi tipo di sistema. Apprezzerai l'opportunità di ascoltare spettacoli che altrimenti non sarebbero disponibili con altri mezzi. Siamo sicuri che che come amante della musica e del bel suono rimarrai impressionato, deliziato e anche stupito dalle registrazioni offerte da CBH MUSIC.

Name: Very, Very Slight Records, LLC
Description:

East Coast, North Carolina, USA – Very, Very Slight Records (VVS) is thrilled to announce its official launch, marking the beginning of a transformative journey in the music industry. Founded by a passionate hip-hop artist and writer, VVS aims to create a movement that emphasizes holistic wellness, encompassing mental health, financial health, and environmental health. The label's name, "Very, Very Slight," is inspired by the clarity grade of diamonds with very, very slight flaws, symbolizing the essence of our journey – rare, valuable, and committed to continuous self-improvement.

The story of VVS is rooted in the founder's personal journey. Growing up on the East Coast of the USA, specifically in North Carolina, he began writing rhymes at the tender age of 14. His initial foray into poetry and spoken word evolved into a deep passion for hip-hop and rap. Raised by a single mother alongside two sisters, Nahia and Maria, his childhood was marked by frequent relocations. Despite these challenges, he found solace and expression in writing, which became a powerful outlet for his creativity and emotions.

Easy Life Entertainment Ltd
Independent Record Label • Artist Management • PR & Marketing

Summary
Easy Life Entertainment Ltd is a boutique, artist-first entertainment company founded in 2014 by industry veterans Jamie Osman and Mark James. As a multi-disciplinary group, the company comprises a management arm (Real Life Management), an independent label (Easy Life Records), and a PR and radio agency (Turn The Page).

Mission
To build sustainable and creatively driven artist careers through a holistic service model - spanning strategic management, innovative marketing, IP ownership, and direct-to-fan engagement, all underpinned by a values-led approach and creative integrity.

What We Do:

Artist Management (Real Life Management): Guiding artists from grassroots emergence to global stages with bespoke strategies around touring, branding, and monetisation.

Record Label (Easy Life Records): Developing, releasing, and growing artists careers with a long term developmental approach

PR & Storytelling (Turn The Page): Creating compelling narratives and content-driven campaigns that break through in a saturated marketplace.

Founders & Leadership

Jamie Osman: A respected figure known for talent scouting and artist development. Leveraged a reputation for long-term career building, led the business to scale, and oversaw its strategic acquisition by ATC Group in 2025.

Mark James: A creative power, bringing years of PR/marketing experience, artist relations, and brand-building to the company’s operations and cultural ethos.

Key team members

Rosie Jennings: Manager at Real Life Management with a wealth of experience in global campaigns

Jordan Bell: a seasoned PR and Radio exec with an impressive and growing roster.

Easy Life Entertainment has one mission - to put artists first in an ever changing industry.

Name: FAME'S
Description:
𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐅𝐀𝐌𝐄’𝐒.
—————————————————
𝐅𝐀𝐌𝐄'𝐒 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨 & 𝐎𝐫𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚 has established itself as a leading destination for orchestral buyout recordings, serving a wide range of clients in film, television, video games, classical music, and music libraries.

Each year, we deliver over 400 high-quality recording orchestral sessions, making us one of the most active orchestral studios in Europe. With unmatched flexibility, our bookings start from just one hour (60 minutes of recording), with sessions available each and every day of the year.

In addition to recording, we provide a full range of services, including a state-of-the-art recording and post-production suite, orchestration, music preparation, editing and mixing, as well as comfortable accommodation and an on-site bistro, making FAME'S a one-stop destination for your orchestral production needs.
——————————————————
𝐅𝐀𝐌𝐄’𝐒 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐭𝐞 is readily recognized as a rising leader in European orchestral training and specialization, offering distinct courses in a variety of musical genres, including Classical, Film Scores, Video Game, Hybrid, Jazz, Modern, Contemporary, and Traditional Orchestral Music.

Offering a number of multi-week long seminars yearly, the program, ie. the ‘European Creative Orchestral Program for Skilled Youth’, is co-funded by FAME’S, the European Union (Creative Europe), and the Ministry of Culture of the Republic of North Macedonia. During their stay, students are given the opportunity to learn under prominent names in the music industry, among which: Roman Simovic, Vesko Eschkenazy, Austin Wintory, Alastair King, Gabriel Prokofiev, and Rusanda Panfili.

Through intense masterclasses, specialized mentorship, and regular public concerts, FAME’S Institute aims to encourage, promote, and further develop European identity and culture by inviting young musicians from all over to take the next eminent step in their extensive collaborative musical journey.

Blending the latest in digital recording technology with the finest in vintage and classic gear, Big Fish offers the ultimate analog and digital recording experience in a comfortable, friendly, and professional environment.

As Founder of Tinta Negra Productions, I specialize in creating polished, market-ready tracks, original scores, and immersive sound design. My work includes sync placements with major brands like Chevrolet, radio hits on stations like Los 40 Chile, and successful international tours.
From recording and post-production to project management and marketing support, I bring creative vision and technical expertise to every project—helping clients stand out with professional, distinctive audio. Fluent in English and Spanish, I make collaboration seamless across markets.

Que vous soyez un musicien en herbe ou un professionnel chevronné, nous sommes là pour transformer vos idées musicales en réalité. Description:
At OptimalSound365, we are passionate about sound. Based in Bratislava, we specialize in delivering top-tier audio production and sound recording services for dynamic and ever-changing environments. Our expertise lies in providing pristine, professional-quality sound for live events, with a focus on high-impact productions like Oktagon MMA.

With over three years of experience in capturing the intensity and emotion of live sports, our team, led by Lukáš Priecel and Peter Polák, ensures flawless sound no matter the location. Our mobile recording setup is designed to adapt seamlessly to any venue, combining precision, efficiency, and creativity to bring every moment to life.

Whether you're hosting a global event or need cutting-edge audio solutions, OptimalSound365 is here to make the world sound better—365 days a year.

Innergy Records is an independent record label and recording studio located in northern New Jersey, USA, that offers music production, recording, mixing, mastering, live sound, marketing, and distribution services to artists.

Name: Juanangel estudio

Juanangel estudio, nació en Salta como resultado del esfuerzo y trabajo en la música desarrollando durante más de 20 años por sus creadores, concebido para que los artístas tengan disposición sin movilizarse de la provincia, tecnología de última generación de producción musical.

Contamos con un excelente diseño acústico y equipamiento de primera línea enclavado en un ámbito natural, con el confort que permitirá al artista disfrutar de su trabajo y de las facilidades que brindan nuestras instalaciones.

Nuestra amplia experiencia nos permite guiar y aconsejar a los músicos sobre las diferentes formas de grabación y cómo alcanzar los resultados deseados, priorizando y optimizando gastos para lograr un equilibrio entre las necesidades presupuestarias y el servicio brindado.

Adicionalmente ofreceremos a las empresas de la zona, la posibilidad de canalizar sus proyectos a través de nuestros servicios, y de exportar el trabajo artístico y técnico hacia otros usuarios tanto nacionales como internacionales.

Tenemos una firme convicción dirigida a difundir nuestros compositores, autores e intérpretes del Norte Argentino, y brindar una cálida recepción a todos aquellos que quieran sumarse a realizar sus creaciones y proyectos musicales en nuestra provincia.

Binsco Records is an innovative sound recording company and independent music label dedicated to fostering creativity and building a collaborative ecosystem for artists. We believe in taking small but impactful steps to reshape the music industry by empowering independent musicians, producers, and creators with the tools, resources, and community they need to thrive.

At Binsco, we go beyond traditional recording and distribution—we cultivate an environment where artistry meets opportunity. Through high-quality sound production, artist development, and a commitment to authentic storytelling, we strive to bring unique voices to the forefront of the music world.

Driven by a passion for originality and collaboration, we aim to create sustainable pathways for emerging and established artists alike, ensuring that music remains a powerful force for cultural evolution.

Name: Ardor Records
Description:
Ardor Records is a modern Christian music label dedicated to creating bold, faith-driven music shaped by both human creativity and innovative AI-enhanced production. Built on the belief that faith and imagination can spark powerful new expressions of art, Ardor Records brings together diverse genres and artists under one mission: ignite hearts, elevate hope, and push the boundaries of what Christian music can sound like today.

Our roster spans three distinct acts:
• Gravel & Grace – A modern Christian Country duo blending Southern storytelling with warm, heartfelt worship themes.
• Saint & Sound – A large multi-racial collective offering worship-pop anchored by dynamic rap and hip-hop elements.
• Volt & Iron – A high-energy trio crafting faith-based trap, hip-hop, and EDM-rock inspired by fitness, discipline, and spiritual resilience.

Across all artists, Ardor Records combines authentic songwriting with AI-enhanced vocal performances and artist imagery to help create a forward-thinking, globally accessible sound. This hybrid creative approach doesn’t replace the human story—it amplifies it.

Whether developing new talent, exploring immersive creative tools, or redefining how Christian music engages a modern audience, Ardor Records is committed to excellence, integrity, and innovation.

Faith. Fire. Modern Sound.

We create music that moves people—spiritually, emotionally, and creatively.

Name: Yard Twenty Five Music
Description:
Yard Twenty Five is a boutique record label dedicated to building the next generation of R&B and Pop icons. We champion Black talent and focus on developing artists with timeless artistry, global potential, and cultural impact.

Our mission is to revive the lost art of true artist development—nurturing raw talent into polished artistry, from songwriting and sound to performance and brand identity. With deep roots in music culture and industry experience spanning Grammy-nominated projects and global collaborations, Yard Twenty Five provides a space where creativity thrives, careers are built with integrity, and artists are empowered to reach their full potential.

From intimate live performance series to international showcases, we’re creating platforms that spotlight the future of R&B while shaping artists into tomorrow’s superstars.

 The UK R&B renaissance is here—and Yard Twenty Five is at the forefront.

Name: DBRecording UG (haftungsbeschränkt)
Description:
Seit über 8 Jahren ist unser Inhaber Dennis, Dozent & Workshop-Coach für Songwriting- , Poetry Slam- , und Rap-Kurse. Seit über 10 Jahren steht er selbst (mal auf den größeren, mal auf den kleineren) Bühnen Deutschlands und veröffentliche regelmäßig eigene Songs.

Ganz frisch durfte er als Frontsänger von "Grillo Funke" den offiziellen Kunst- und Kulturbeitrag zur UEFA EURO2024 für die Host-City Gelsenkirchen machen. Der Song heißt "In Dir (Meine Stadt GE)" und gilt als neue GE-Hymne.

Im Jahr 2022 eröffnete das "DBRecording"-Tonstudio in Gronau.
Hier bieten wir neben der reinen Song- oder Podcastaufnahme, ebenfalls die exklusive Instrumentalproduktion - oder auch das reine Mix- und Mastering an. Zu den Angeboten zählen aber auch das "Songwriting" oder der professionelle Dreh eines Musikvideos.

Wir sind sehr stolz ein so tolles & kreatives Experten-Team zu haben, 
die jeden Tag ihre kreative Art und Expertise einbringen und so jede musikalische Reise zu ihrer eigenen machen - denn nur so können wir 100% abliefern!

Zum Tonstudio selbst: Wir bieten euch in einer entspannten Atmosphäre und ganz ohne Zeitdruck,  die Möglichkeit, eure eigenen Song- oder Podcast Produktionen professionell aufzunehmen. Zusammen können wir euch - von der Aufnahme, über das professionelle Mix & Master, bis hin zu eurem einzigartigen Musikvideo - auf eurer Reise begleiten und alles nach euren Wünschen gestalten.

Unter "www.db-recording.de" stellen wir uns
- und eure Möglichkeiten - kurz vor.

Wylde Chylde Records is where raw emotion meets rogue technology. We build and launch AI-powered artists with grit, guts, and a heavy dose of rebellion — starting with outlaw country phenom Cody M. Brooks.

Based in Los Angeles, Nashville, and Idaho (yeah, we’re weird like that), we combine bleeding-edge AI tools with real human storytelling to craft original music that sounds like whiskey, heartbreak, and something that might explode.

We don’t chase trends. We create them.
We don’t follow rules. We rewire the system.
We don’t talk about the future. We build it — one track at a time.

Bienvenue aux Hautes Sphères, un espace unique dédié à la création, à l’innovation et à l’expression artistique. Conçu pour répondre aux besoins des musiciens, podcasteurs et créateurs, notre studio propose un cadre inspirant où vos projets prennent vie avec excellence.

Un studio d’enregistrement musical haut de gamme

Équipé de technologies de pointe et d’une acoustique optimisée, notre studio offre un environnement idéal pour des sessions d’enregistrement professionnelles. Que vous soyez artiste, producteur ou compositeur, nous vous accompagnons pour sublimer votre vision musicale, de la première note à la dernière.

Un espace dédié aux podcasts

Les Hautes Sphères, c’est aussi un lieu pensé pour les créateurs de contenu audio. Que vous lanciez votre premier podcast ou que vous soyez un podcasteur confirmé, nous mettons à votre disposition des équipements de qualité pour produire des contenus captivants, avec une clarté sonore irréprochable.

Un lieu de convivialité et d’inspiration

Au-delà des technologies, Les Hautes Sphères se distingue par son ambiance chaleureuse et stimulante. Avec son espace de vie, son grand écran pour vos sessions de brainstorming ou projections, et ses services personnalisés, nous avons tout prévu pour faire de chaque projet une expérience unique.

Name: The Song Forge
Description:
Music is a timeless gift that will always capture a specific moment, experience or idea. Bring your memories, feelings and creative thoughts to life with The Song Forge!

Our goal is to help seasoned artists, casual players and any music lovers craft and finish songs. We believe that music is one of the most powerful art forms that covers the full range of human emotions and connects communities all over the world. With collaboration and the right team, anyone can create high quality music for yourself, a band or loved ones.

We cover many facets of the song production pipeline from recording to writing to artist sit ins and more. Our studio players, writers, sound engineers and touring artists are spread across a huge network of different styles, genres and instruments. With The Song Forge, these valuable creation tools are all at your disposal!

Our Services:
Recording/Session work
Co-Writing/Songwriting
Mixing
Mastering
Light Design
Live Show/Private Event
Music Industry Consulting -(live performance, technical questions, songwriting, stage production etc)

Owner/Founder, Stan Pszeniczka, brings an extremely vast and talented network of musicians to the table. His music career, light design services and production skills have led him to work directly with many Grammy Award winners, national touring bands and huge festivals around the country.

The Song Forge was born to bring these valuable connections to any music lovers with the desire to create. Everyone has the ability to create high quality music with the right tools and assistance!

Stan currently tours as the Light Designer for 8x Grammy Award winner/Hall of Fame Blues legend Buddy Guy and is also the Drum Tech for Buddy's Grammy Award winning writer, producer, drummer Tom Hambridge.

Right through to the modern-day trailblazers like Gerd Jansen, Leon Vynehall, Detroit Swindle, Moodyman…

Name: XOY Production AB
Description:
XOY Production is an independent music label specializing in electronic music such as synthpop, EBM, and electropunk and other sub genres based in Stockholm, Sweden. Our mission is to discover and support talented artists in these genres, and to provide them with the resources they need to succeed in the music industry.

We are passionate about electronic music and the unique energy it brings to the world of music. From the iconic sounds of synthpop and EBM, to the cutting-edge beats of electropunk, we believe that this genres has the power to capture the hearts and minds of audiences everywhere.

Our team of experienced industry professionals are dedicated to providing our artists with the best possible platform to showcase their music. We offer top-of-the-line recording and production facilities, as well as comprehensive promotion and marketing support, to help our artists reach their full potential.

We are always on the lookout for new and exciting talent, and we welcome submissions from aspiring artists who share our passion for electronic music.

If you are a synthpop, EBM, electropunk, or electronic music artist looking to take your career to the next level, XOY Production is the perfect partner for you. Get in touch with us today to learn more about how we can help you reach your goals.

ShapeHard - Émotion et Authenticité par le Son

 Services Proposés :

- Composition musicale à l'image : Création de mélodies originales adaptées aux projets audiovisuels.
- Traitement audio pour podcasts : Optimisation des voix pour un son clair et professionnel.
- Intégration audio pour le jeu vidéo : Utilisation de Wwise, FMOD ou programmation en C#/C++ pour une expérience immersive.

 Vous êtes : Un  personne ayant besoin de son, notamment les agences de podcast, réalisateurs, publicitaires, créateurs de jeux vidéo, chargés de productions, et leads audio en studio.

 Approche : L'authenticité et la sincérité sont au cœur de sa démarche artistique. Chaque projet est unique, et Alexis s'efforce de comprendre ses clients pour répondre au mieux à leurs besoins.

 Expériences Notables :

Lead Audio sur "Greed" : Responsable de la musique pour un jeu vidéo disponible sur Steam, il a dirigé une équipe de trois sound designers pour composer 42 minutes de musique orchestrale en seulement deux mois. Un défi passionnant !
Sonorisation pour L'Oréal : Il a créé des sons pour des vidéos promotionnelles de produits cosmétiques destinées à Instagram.
 Prêt à donner vie à vos projets ? Alexis invite les intéressés à réserver un créneau dans son calendrier pour discuter de leurs besoins audio :

Betterland Studios is a recording studio on Huron Road in Downtown Cleveland, located inside the Howell Building, next to the Metropolitan 9. Formally owned and founded by DJ & Music Producer, Tre Smith.

Betterland Studios is a new emerging leader in the Cleveland music industry and is ready for the next 10 years to reflect this core value by hosting the leading recording artists from today and yesterday. Rehearsal Space currently in development, you can literally walk into Betterland with an idea and walk out with a finished product. Theres also the added benefit of full amenities, full time engineers, rooftop smoke lounge, assistants and runners on request, all while enjoying the ambiance of being next to a 5 Star Hotel in the heart of downtown Cleveland, between Progressive Field and Rocket Arena. 

With Ableton Live, Avid , Yamaha Music, Universal Audio, Alpha Theta (Pioneer DJ), and a Wide Array of Digital Drum Sample Collections, endless synth options such as Arturia Analog Lab, our Entire KORG Collection, and a forever expanding microphone collection, Betterland Studios provides its artists with a beautiful, open, positive, and well designed creative space that facilitates efficient project management and a seamless, imaginative work flow for music and audio.

Name: Always throw Loving Affectional Sounds Records
Young Future Entertainment
Description:
"At Young Future Entertainment, our mission is to bring Liberian music to the forefront of the international scene and make it a recognized and respected genre in the world of music." We aim to achieve this by providing opportunities for our artists to tour and collaborate with top artists in Africa and beyond, making their music accessible to a wider audience.
In addition to promoting and developing the careers of our artists, we also offer a range of complementary services, including Mixing and Mastering, Project Management, Music Consultancy, Distribution, Playlisting and Strategic Marketing that are tailored to the needs and wants of our artists. Our goal is to provide our clients with a one-stop-shop for all their music needs, allowing them to focus on their craft and reach their full potential.
Our achievements so far are a testament to our commitment and dedication to the industry. In 2021, we worked closely with MTN Liberia to sign the winner of their talent competition, Kaandace Cooper, who went on to win New Artist of the Year at the MTN Liberia Music Awards. We then went on to release her debut EP "Love & Life", which received widespread recognition and critical acclaim. The first single off the EP, "Answer Me," debuted at No. 25 on the Apple Music Charts in Liberia and was also reviewed by popular magazine EarMilk, while the video has accumulated 59k views on YouTube. The EP itself debuted at No. 4 on the Apple Music Album Charts in Liberia and No. 2 on the Audiomack Liberia Album Charts. It was also featured on and received positive reviews from leading African blogs such as Pulse Nigeria, which gave it a 4 out of 5 rating.
"We are proud of what we have accomplished so far and look forward to continuing to push the boundaries of Liberian music and providing our artists with the resources and support they need to succeed."

Name: Emerald Shire Records
Description:
Emerald Shire Records is an innovative, AI-driven record label that merges artistry, technology, and storytelling. Based on a vision of blending natural beauty with futuristic creativity, it represents a new generation of music production — one where human imagination and artificial intelligence collaborate seamlessly.

The label’s aesthetic draws inspiration from the lush mystique of the Pacific Northwest, symbolized by the Emerald Shire name: a fusion of organic creativity (“Emerald”) and timeless artistry (“Shire”). Each artist under the label embodies a distinct fusion of genres and moods, from EDM-country hybrids to cinematic pop and adult contemporary storytelling.

Emerald Shire Records stands out for:

AI Artist Innovation: Home to pioneering virtual performers such as Jovie Clark, Rhyson Riley, Sutton Lake, and River Brent — each with distinct visual identities, musical personalities, and evolving narratives.

Genre Fusion & Evolution: The label embraces the crossroads of classic roots and modern soundscapes — merging country warmth, electronic depth, and lyrical intimacy.

Creative Autonomy: Artists and AI collaborators co-write, produce, and evolve in real time, giving each track a unique emotional and sonic fingerprint.

Visual Storytelling: Every release is paired with cinematic visuals, immersive album art, and high-concept identity design that extend the music into full sensory experiences.

In short, Emerald Shire Records is more than a label — it’s a living ecosystem of digital artistry, where music, visuals, and AI creativity converge to redefine what it means to be an artist in the modern world.

Name: Jawbone Flats Records
Description:
Jawbone Flats Records is an independent record label focused on artist development, high-quality releases, and clear-to-license masters. We pair hands-on A&R with modern production and distribution, helping creators move from promising demos to impactful records—and helping music supervisors find reliable, one-stop songs that land.

What we do

A&R & Production: song development, pre-pro, recording, mixing, and mastering

Releases & Marketing: distribution, creative direction, visual assets, rollout strategy

Sync & Licensing: one-stop clearance, alt mixes, instrumentals, stems, cue sheets, fast turnarounds

Catalog Growth: metadata discipline, versions for editors (60/30/15, TV mixes, clean edits)

Who we work with

Artists: emerging and mid-career acts ready to build sustainable catalogs

For Picture: supervisors, editors, producers, brands, trailers, sports, and agencies seeking ready-to-clear music with strong hooks

How we work

Artist-first ethos, transparent splits, focus on long-term catalog value

Genre-flexible with a bias toward memorable writing, characterful vocals, and mix-ready production

Deliverables designed for real-world use: WAV/MP3, instrumentals, stems, alts, and detailed metadata

Get in touch

If you’re an artist, follow our page for submission windows, release news, and behind-the-scenes updates.

Our artists retain 80 percent of their royalties and own their masters after three years, with a 30-song development structure designed to build catalogs and careers.

We serve artists across genres and borders through our four chapters—Gospel, World, Urban R&B, and Creative Lifestyle music—reaching audiences in the US, Brazil, Canada, South Africa, and the UK. THE is not just a label; it is a community-driven movement, where collaboration replaces competition and equity meets innovation.

We offer:
	•	Strategic songwriting camps and co-writing residencies
	•	In-house production and visual content development

	•	A reality show documenting our artist journeys and creative process

At THE, we do not just sign talent—we develop leaders, build legacy, and make room for sound to shape culture.

Name: Jared Marzin Audio
Description:
Meet Jared Marzin, a multifaceted force in the music world hailing from the vibrant inner suburbs of southeast Melbourne. Jared's journey through music began in his formative years when he cut his teeth as a roadie for his father, traversing pubs, clubs, and dive bars, soaking in the raw energy of live performances.

Driven by a burning desire to create, Jared found his rhythm as a drummer, lending his beats to numerous professional artists across Melbourne's dynamic live music scene for over two decades. However, destiny had other plans for Jared, leading him from the spotlight to the shadows behind the stage and studio consoles.

As a producer, sound engineer, and musician, Jared's work reflects his profound love for people and music. His eclectic palette spans genres from classical to metal, blues to hip hop, disco/funk to house/techno, ensuring his productions pulse with an ever-evolving, dynamic energy.

Beyond the studio, Jared's talents extend to the turntables, where he transforms events into unforgettable experiences as a sought-after DJ for weddings, birthday celebrations, and private/corporate functions. 

With Jared Marzin at the helm, the pulse of Melbourne's music scene beats stronger than ever before.

At La Maldad Studio, we are not just a recording studio—we are a creative hub where underrepresented voices are amplified, and innovation thrives. With a focus on inclusivity, authenticity, and top-tier production quality, our mission is to provide artists with the tools and environment they need to create impactful, boundary-pushing art.

We specialize in offering a full suite of music production services, from voice recording and instrumental tracking to beat-making and complete production for albums, marketing campaigns, films, and documentaries. Our team is experienced in delivering high-quality sound that not only captures the artist's vision but elevates it. Whether you're an emerging artist looking for a space to develop your sound or a brand needing custom music for your next project, La Maldad Studio has you covered.

What sets us apart is our commitment to collaboration and creativity. We believe in working closely with artists and clients to ensure their vision comes to life. Our state-of-the-art equipment, combined with our deep understanding of music and culture, enables us to craft projects that resonate both sonically and culturally.

At La Maldad Studio, we value diversity and social impact. We pride ourselves on being a safe and inclusive space, especially for queer artists and women, offering a supportive environment where all voices are heard. Our passion for music and culture drives us to push artistic boundaries, creating work that not only sounds good but carries meaning.

Partner with us to bring your artistic vision to life. From recording sessions to full-scale production, our team is here to ensure your project is a success, reflecting the uniqueness of your sound and your story. Let's create something groundbreaking together at La Maldad Studio—where creativity meets culture.

With a catalog that has surpassed 20 million streams and includes releases by El Huervo, Ratvader, Catbeats, Sigh-Phy, and more, Swedish Columbia continues to serve as a living document of a community bound by creativity and collaboration.

Swedish Columbia aka SWEDC aka (District of) Swedish Columbia (Autonomous Zone) has no affiliation with Columbia. The name is an amalgamation of District of Columbia and Sweden representing the two roots of the label.

Name: Yucca Man Records
Description:
Yucca Man Records is a boutique music studio, music house, label, and creative oasis located in Twentynine Palms, CA - at the north entrance of Joshua Tree National Park. 

Equipped with a bespoke collection of vintage microphones, tube compressors, preamps, and instruments, YMR packs the amenities of a world-class music studio to the remote, dusty, scenic beauty of California’s most mysterious national park.

Our services include:

- Recording: 32-channels of preamps, from Universal Audio to Neve and beyond. With an array of classic microphones and and acoustically treated space, YMR is the perfect place to capture the best of your music, podcast, voiceover, and beyond. We provide studio time for independent artists non-exclusively, as well as discounted studio time for artists who wish to join our label.

- Mixing / Mastering: Yucca Man Records specializes in post-audio services to finalize your recordings and bring them to spec for broadcast, radio, streaming and web. Perfect your mix in our acoustically treated mix-room and get your recording to sound great anywhere - in the car, on your phone, or in the studio. 

- Creative Consolation / A&R: Need a hand bringing your work to the finish line? Work with our in-house producer and engineer to bring your ideas to life. YMR provides songwriting, arranging, lyric writing, vocal production, and general A&R services to help artists grow.

- Marketing - With our network of music licensors, music supervisors, and directors/ filmmakers, YMR works to get your work heard by the right people. Share your music with producers who will expand your audience and reach.

- Distribution / Streaming: Ready to share your music or podcast with the world? Publish your work on all streaming services through YMR and collect re style, or length. Take ownership of the sound in your project, creating custom scoring, or create a sonic brand for your company.

With a commitment to excellence and a passion for innovation, Fisgard Music Studio is a trusted partner for clients both locally and internationally. Our team of dedicated professionals is here to support every phase of your project, from the first recording session to the final mastered track. Whether you’re an independent artist, Musician, a major label act, a filmmaker, or a brand, or even a creative professional in need of top-quality sound, Fisgard Music Studio provides the expertise, tools, and collaborative environment you need to bring your vision to life. We’re here to support every step of your journey, making sure your project sounds as good as it feels.

Experience the difference of world-class audio—no matter where you’re located.

Name: WIYAKA
Description:
Transmettre connecter, vibrer au son des voix.

Avec une douce pointe de nostalgie, je repense à ces cassettes audio que l'on s’échangeait entre amis au lycée dans les années 90. Des instants précieux, témoins d’un autre temps, gravés dans nos mémoires. Les années ont passé, et aujourd’hui, c’est des messages numériques et des fichiers MP3 que l’on s’échange. De cette évolution, mêlée au charme des souvenirs d’hier, est née l’idée de Wiyaka.

Ma mission est de tisser des liens à travers la magie du son. Grâce à mon enregistreur, je capture des histoires uniques et les transforme en créations sonores qui invitent à l’évasion et à la réflexion… et qui sait ? cela pourrait, peut-être même, changer votre regard sur le monde.

Créez votre capsule sonore personnalisée : Immortalisez vos souvenirs, vos messages ou vos réflexions, à offrir ou à vous offrir. Un cadeau inoubliable et intemporel.

Découvrez des récits exceptionnels : Chaque voix porte une histoire, chaque parcours de vie est unique. Plongez dans des univers captivants grâce à mes créations sonores.

Participez à un atelier : Initiez-vous à l’enregistrement sonore et explorez la puissance de la voix pour raconter tout ou rien.

Rejoignez moi dans cette aventure sonore où chaque voix mérite d'être écoutée et partagée.

Name: Bjak
Description:
Bjak is the creative project of Chicago-born DJ, producer, and sound designer Brian Cullen - a long-standing figure in the deep and soulful house scene. Emerging from Chicago’s early 1990s Loft and Deep House movement, Bjak built his reputation through influential residencies, music production, and collaborations that helped shape the city’s underground sound.

A member of Chicago’s Soul Foundation collective and co-founder of RealDEEP Recordings, his career has spanned DJing, studio production, label development, and creative design. From early vinyl releases on Eargasmic Recordings and Deep Explorer Music (remixed by the legendary Larry Heard / Mr. Fingers) to his acclaimed “The Passion’s Journey” 3xLP on deepArtSounds (Zurich), Bjak’s output reflects a lifelong dedication to craft, depth, and emotion.

Now based between Los Angeles and Chicago, Bjak continues to create and perform globally, exploring the intersection of analog warmth, modern sound design, and timeless groove.

Name: 50DollarMixClub
Description:
Every artist deserves to hear their vision come to life, and that's what we're here for. We believe that quality mixes can be affordable. 

50DollarMixClub currently offers services for mixing, vocal production, and songwriting, and we are in the process of offering mastering services, as well! If you send us your session or songs, we can give you a free invoice today!

Name: EASY Recording
Description:
EASY Recording supports talented Swiss vocalists with low entry level offerings, ranging from a mastered demo track all the way up to their own song with all rights and world wide digital distribution. 
These offerings can optionally include branding, web and social presence and content, as well as advice on financing, protection of rights, and collection of royalties.
EASY Recording means EASY and fair business, as well. No upfront commitments, result based fees (vs. time / effort based), free test runs, defined exit points during the production process. 
And, there is referral fee program in place for vocal coaches and EASY clients.

1813 is a Creator first rights management company bridging the gap between creatives and opportunities. Thanks to our industry relationships, we link our creatives to global opportunities, including writing camps, online sessions, and impactful collaborations. 1813 works with creatives to protect, administer, license and collect on their work, not matter the media.

Name: Gazelien Records
Description:
Gazelien Records was founded in 2018 by students of the Recording and Production Techniques (RPT) class as a platform to provide academic and Music Industry based experience to meet the growing interest of the NYU Abu Dhabi Music Program Students in order to provide them with real-world opportunities. 

Professor Matteo Marciano, along with his RPT students, have envisioned Gazelien Records as a nucleus that allows for the music technologists, record producers and musicians at NYUAD to have a practical application of their work within the University. 

With the constant evolution of the expectations for students entering the industry and the constant development of new technological advancement, student training must go beyond the classroom and must encompass real world scenarios and experience to ensure they are ready as soon as they enter the Industry.

Gazelien Records operates like a major label company thanks to the support and the music industry experience of the faculty involved. Additionally, the world class audio equipment in the studio and recording spaces allows for students to practice with industry standard software, hardware and recording spaces. Thus, the skills learned and the experience gained by students is essential to prepare them for careers in the Music of Post Production Industries.

The team of audio engineers, producers and musicians, all exclusively NYUAD Students, have worked on multiple national and international projects acquiring tremendous exposure and providing great experience as they exercise vital skills needed within the Industry. 

Project clusters encourage collaborative, multi-disciplinary work among Gazelien Records audio engineers, producers and musicians, making its signature NYUAD Gazelien Records a regional incubator for music technology research and music creation.

Name: DS Records
Description:
Willkommen bei DS Records – deinem Tor zur grenzenlosen Musikalität und Kreativität! Bei uns geht es nicht nur um Instrumente, sondern um die Magie, die sie schaffen. Entdecke hochwertige Gitarren, professionelles Studio-Equipment und individuelle Musikberatung, die deine musikalischen Träume Wirklichkeit werden lassen.

DS Records ist mehr als nur eine Plattform für Musikinstrumente und Aufnahmetechnologie. Wir sind deine kreative Oase, dein musikalischer Kompass und dein Unterstützungssystem. Unsere Musikberater stehen dir zur Seite, um dir bei jedem Schritt deiner musikalischen Reise zu helfen – sei es bei der Auswahl des perfekten Instruments, der Optimierung deines Studio-Sounds oder der Weiterentwicklung deines musikalischen Talents. Starte deine Reise heute und lass uns gemeinsam Musikgeschichte schreiben!

Description:
dystopia records is a record company founded in Brno, Czechia. Since 2019, we have been dedicated to recording songs, mixing and mastering, music production and, above all, moving our customers and their creations to a higher level.

If you entrust the sound to us, you can't go wrong. We can write, record and mix a song for you, compose music for it or shoot a simple studio video. If you're not sure where to start with your project, our producers will surely know.

You can come to us, no matter how experienced or inexperienced you are as an artist. Our producers are fast, have a lot of experience, can give advice, give the right feedback, get you in the right mood and always get the most out of you and your idea.

From the music production and recording portfolio, we mostly specialize in modern hip-hop and EDM, our producers do a great job mainly with editing vocals and arrangements.

Name: Just You Records
Description:
Just You Records est un studio d'enregistrement entièrement numérique, situé en pleine campagne, offrant un cadre paisible et inspirant pour tous les musiciens et artistes en quête d'un endroit cosy pour enregistrer leur musique. 

Dans ce studio, vous trouverez une ambiance chaleureuse et conviviale, où règne une atmosphère propice à la créativité et à l'expression artistique. L'équipement et la qualité de son irréprochable vous permettent d'enregistrer en toute sérénité, sans avoir à vous soucier des bruits extérieurs. 

Mais ce qui fait vraiment la différence chez Just You Records, c'est l'accompagnement personnalisé que je propose à tous mes clients. En effet, je suis un professionnel passionné et expérimenté, qui met tout en œuvre pour offrir un accompagnement sur mesure à chaque artiste.
En somme, Just You Records est un lieu où l'on peut s'immerger pleinement dans la création musicale, grâce à une ambiance chaleureuse et à un accompagnement personnalisé. Un studio où l'on peut enregistrer sa musique en toute confiance, avec la certitude d'obtenir un son professionnel de grande qualité.
