Name: Offbeat Audio Ltd
Description:
Offbeat is a professional audio production company based on Edinburgh’s Royal Mile, specialising in high end audiobook production, voice over and ADR recording.
We are an official studio provider and official programme provider for BBC Radio, and our studio is BBC approved for broadcast production. We work with major publishers, broadcasters and production companies, delivering performance led, broadcast quality spoken word audio.
Offbeat has produced audiobooks, voice work and recorded programmes for leading organisations including Penguin Random House, as well as other major UK publishers and independent production companies. Our studio has worked with internationally recognised figures including Tilda Swinton, Nicola Sturgeon and Brian Cox.
We are particularly known for our directing led approach to audiobook recording. Sessions are performance focused, script accurate and paced with care, with close attention paid to language, character consistency and narrative flow. This makes Offbeat a trusted studio for author narrated audiobooks as well as actor led productions.
Alongside audiobooks, Offbeat records voice over and ADR for radio, film, television, podcasts and audio guides. Clients value our calm studio environment, linguistic precision and ability to work efficiently without compromising quality.
The studio is run by Iain McKinna, an audio producer and director with nearly fifty years experience in recording studios, music production and broadcast audio, alongside studio manager Kirsty McKinna, who oversees day to day studio operations and client care. Together they ensure a calm, professional and well run environment for long form spoken word production.
Offbeat works primarily in person from its Royal Mile studio, supporting projects from single day recordings through to full scale audiobook productions.

Led by artist and producer Tony Vincent, SoundShop370 has established itself as a go-to independent recording studio working in multiple genres of music and production. Name: E.G.D.F. Labs
Description:
organically grown and promoted electronic music label that believes music should not only be made to be enjoyable, but also made to be timeless.

Whether the sounds of our artists are heard at the moment they're released, or 10 years later, we are confident that each and every song will still contain the sonic fortitude and harmonic resonance to enter the senses with an impact that remains relevant, and echoes its unwavering exactitude well into the future, ebbing and flowing with each generation.

Our catalog is sprinkled with timeless elements of orchestras and brass fused together with modern synths, wobbly basses and thick pounding drums. Stretching from the highest clouds of auditory experiences down to the emotional landscapes outstretched waves at the bottom of a deep ocean .

Each song opens a message in a bottle brought forth to each new listener, carried by waves of uniqueness, masterfully crafted and engineered compositions.

Envelope stretching, genre bending, and experimental sounds of dubstep, drum and bass.

Entry to our soundscape finds each and every listener coasting along on vessels built for epic audio exploration adventures. Reinterpretations and groundbreaking mixtures that encompass a variety of electronic styles and signatures.

With every song listener embark in vessels that have just launched, taken flight, doven into, came crashing down, or burrowed up into the E.G.D.F. Labs Catalog.

To all we welcome, and encourage, to take their time, explore, come and go as you please, there will always be something new to hear when you get back.

The journey may begin with Encouraging Great Directions Forward, but as one reaches the temporary end of our catalog, one comes to understand that the mobile, remote, and experimental Labs are hard at work to keep Electronic Generations Defining Futures, with new ideas, and new innovations.

E.G.D.F. Labs could be anywhere, at anytime. But the music is only a search field away.

Description: Unit E Records is a community-driven record label dedicated to preserving the cultural identity of Denver and the surrounding region through the documentation of music on vinyl. By pressing these sounds onto vinyl, we ensure that their contributions are not lost to history, creating a lasting archive of Denver’s rich and evolving music scene.

Name: Black Ram Sound
Description:
Black Ram Sound is an arts & media company founded by musician, producer, artist, and archivist Evan Haywood in 2016. We have grown from our roots as a private press record label into a multifaceted creative organization devoted to supporting artistic innovators representing diverse disciplines, with a lot of help from a tight-knit community of artists and musicians in Michigan. The Black Ram logo was hand-drawn by Shingo Brown and developed into a linocut print by Rachelle Baker, marking our first collaboration with groundbreaking visual artists. 

The Black Ram Treehouse is an all-purpose music studio in Ann Arbor, MI, opened by Evan Haywood in 2020 to support the recording, mixing, and mastering of a wide variety of sounds. Evan was inspired to build the studio after spending time with his late friend & collaborator Lee “Scratch” Perry in Jamaica and visiting the ruins of the legendary Black Ark studio in 2019. Our reputation quickly grew as a sanctuary for musicians to come together and complete ambitious projects. We have continued to cultivate an environment defined by its welcoming energy, efficient workflow, and warm sound. All genres welcome!

Name: Will C. Music Productions
Description:
In addition to being a Board-Certified Music Therapist, Will Curley is an active Audio Engineer within the music industry. He has mixed, restored, and digitally remastered renowned works for a variety of major and independent record labels.

In recent years Will has had the opportunity to utilize his Audio Engineering expertise in the Music Therapy realm. Across the globe, populations benefit from music-based therapeutic tools custom-tailored to their specific needs. Will believes musical elements can be sculpted and enhanced from an audio engineering standpoint to maximize their therapeutic properties. He has collaborated with established health care companies to innovate new concepts and to build exciting, immersive sensory experiences.

Here are a few places his audio engineering work has been featured:

• BBC

• The New York Times

Name: WAXaddict Records, LLC
Description:
Established in 2003, WAXaddict Records was one of Chicago’s pioneering “click-and-mortar” record stores - uniting vinyl culture, design, and community years before “lifestyle retail” became a concept. Focused on underground dance music and creative collaboration, WAXaddict specialized in curated House, Techno, Disco, Electronica, Drum & Bass, Hip-Hop, and beyond.

More than a record shop, WAXaddict was a cultural hub featuring an in-store DJ booth, live performances, art and fashion events, and exclusive releases from local and international artists. The store’s innovative mix of e-commerce and in-person experiences helped shape Chicago’s creative scene and influenced the next generation of music and lifestyle retail.

Name: Downbeat Studio
Description:
Downbeat is a recording and production studio dedicated to capturing great performances and turning songs into records that connect.

Based in a carefully curated space where everything is ready to go, Downbeat removes the friction from the recording process so artists can focus entirely on the music. No setup delays. No technical barriers. Just a calm, professional environment built for creativity.

Run by producer, composer and multi-instrumentalist Lorenzo De Feo, the studio specialises in guitar-driven music — from rock, pop, and indie to roots and alternative sounds. Lorenzo’s background as a session guitarist and his deep understanding of arrangement, groove, and dynamics give every production a strong musical foundation.

Whether it's a full band tracking live or a solo artist developing their sound, Downbeat helps shape the vision from the first demo to the final master. Artists are encouraged to experiment, push their own boundaries, and deliver performances that feel honest and inspired.

Lorenzo has written and produced music for global brands including Sony ATV, EMI, Sky, Audio Network, Sonoton and BBH, with tracks placed in film, TV and advertising worldwide. As a producer, he’s worked on releases played on BBC Radio 1 and 6 Music, and has developed emerging acts alongside more established names.

Description: We embrace the hypnotic pulse of electro, the melancholic haze of wave, the raw energy of EBM, and the psychedelic edge of acid and techno. Our sound is familiar yet futuristic, a coded message to those who know. E23 is for the outsiders, the ones drawn to chaos, the ones who find meaning in the undefined and the absurd. Every release is a statement—sonically sharp, visually striking, and timeless in execution. Inspired by the unrelenting vision of Factory Records and the cryptic aesthetics of Gerald Donald, we document a movement, one catalog number at a time. With a DIY ethos, complete transparency, and an unwavering dedication to quality, we exist for ourselves and those like us—collectors, selectors, and the ones who still believe. Every record is a portal. Tune in.

Silence of Sound Studios is dedicated to harnessing the therapeutic power of sound to promote holistic healing and well-being. 

We specialise in creating immersive sound experiences that blend scientific research with creative expression, aiming to improve mental, emotional, and physical health. 

Our work is grounded in the principles of sonic ecology and neurophysiology, exploring the profound impact that sound can have on the mind and body. 

At Silence of Sound Studios, we are committed to providing evidence-based sound therapy tools and techniques that empower individuals to cultivate resilience and find balance in their lives. 

Whether through our podcast series, workshops, or tailored soundscapes, our mission is to bridge the gap between science and everyday wellness, offering accessible and transformative solutions for a healthier, more harmonious life.

Name: Data Discs
Description:
DATA DISCS was founded in 2015 as the first record label solely dedicated to releasing video game soundtracks on vinyl. Our current partners include SEGA, CAPCOM, KONAMI, TREASURE and SNK.

We carefully remaster game soundtracks and present them as officially licensed, high quality packages. Our intention is to promote the work of game composers, which is all too often overlooked, and introduce people to an area of music that, despite being culturally significant in many ways, has seldom been available on any format (let alone on vinyl). We aim to release soundtracks that work as standalone pieces; albums that can be enjoyed by casual listeners as well as game fans, and showcase the creativity and ingenuity of the people behind them. We are based in London, England.

Name: Reverse Studio Milano
Description: Nato dall’incontro all’Accademia del Teatro alla Scala tra Andrea e Giacomo, Reverse si pone l’obiettivo di un approccio al suono e alla musica che, tra tecnica e cura sartoriale, metta sempre al centro la passione e la curiosità per nuove possibilità da scoprire. Reverse è pensato per essere un luogo, prima ancora che uno studio. Il posto migliore possibile per stimolare, concentrarsi e rilassarsi sulla creazione. Una casa delle idee, dove lasciarsi andare all’ispirazione e alla ricerca di idee nuove. La struttura stessa dello studio è pensata in ogni aspetto per trasmettere la sua filosofia di produzione. Non un luogo di tecnica asettica, ma un ambiente stimolante e di ispirazione, nel cuore pulsante di Milano. A pochi passi dai luoghi della movida e del fermento culturale dei Navigli, Reverse rappresenta anche un rifugio dal trambusto urbano, per potersi focalizzare sugli obiettivi e le modalità migliori per raggiungerli, confrontandosi con esperti, ma soprattutto appassionati.

Name: Robert's Recording Reel
Description:
Voicing your project, from a 5 second promo to a 30 hour audiobook.  No job is finished until YOU are completely satisfied.  Full service recording and editing facilities for quick turn around.

Out of high school, I studied radio & television production, and recording studio engineering.  I interned at several radio stations to gain experience.  But then drifted away from the vocal arts.

Since then, I've graduated law school and am a licensed attorney; graduated nursing school and am a registered emergency room nurse; graduated business school with an MBA.  I'm a Coast Guard search and rescue veteran.  I've stood an Army post in Germany staring down the Evil Empire.  I've worked in fast food, mainframe computer rooms, gun shops.  I've sold door to door.

If it's out there to be done, I've done it.  And now, through all that, I can bring your voice project to life ... because I've probably done, eaten, or bought the subject of the script.

I have a passion for nature, conservation, and animal care.  We foster dogs for a local rescue.  When I can get away, we love to travel ... especially if there's a beach or forest involved.

And this experience and passion will come through in your commercial, narration, audio book or e-learning project.

Description:
Greener on the Othaside, an innovative artist development and management label, is making waves in the music industry by championing community wellness and supporting aspiring artists in their journey towards success. With a strong focus on nurturing talent, connecting artists with independent and major labels, and collaborating with renowned producers, Greener on the Othaside is redefining the traditional artist management model. At Greener on the Othaside, our mission is clear: to foster the growth and well-being of artists while empowering them to achieve their dreams. We believe that a holistic approach to artist development is vital, which is why we prioritize the physical, mental, and emotional well-being of our artists. By providing comprehensive support and resources, we strive to create an environment where creativity can thrive and artists can reach their full potential.

Our roster boasts an exceptional lineup of talented individuals who are making their mark in the music industry. From the dynamic and versatile Jay Lewn to the soulful Isabella Award, the multi-talented Georgia Parker, and the captivating Mar.Dineero, our artists showcase a diverse range of styles and genres. Description:
Evil Eye Recordings, a label born and based in Beirut, Lebanon, specializes in forms of melodic techno, organica and afro house.

A little story time. Why is it called evil eye? No, there’s nothing evil about it. Yes, there’s definitely something mystical instead. The power that a shared belief can hold, one where intention and feelings are able to transcend the spiritual into the physical and ultimately touch you.

That’s what it’s about. Taking that positive energy, channeling it through music, and sharing the beauty behind the myth, in a modern and relatable way. Every song becomes a talisman in itself, protecting you, feeding you, nurturing you.

Description:

Based in Haarlem, Netherlands, I've had the privilege of releasing my music on labels such as Extended Play, Shall Not Fade, and Monki & Friends + VSN World. And in 2019, I was honored to win the AVA emerging producer competition.

When I'm not busy creating, you can find me dancing really badly at a party or lost in the realms of Middle-earth (I may or may not be a bit of a Lord of the Rings fanatic). I hope my music transports you to new worlds.

Name: Discotexas
Description:
Discotexas (often abbreviated as DTX) is an electronic music label founded in Lisbon, Portugal. Established in 2007 by Moullinex and Xinobi.

The origins of Discotexas reflect a community ethos, emerging from the collaborative efforts of its founders. Initially conceived as a loose collective orchestrating parties within Lisbon's music landscape, DTX evolved into a platform for releasing their own music. During this evolution, the label embraced other artists, both admired professionals and personal connections, who resonated with their creative vision. The ethos of collaboration is central to Discotexas's approach, encouraging creative synergy among its artists and collaborators. Since its inception, DTX has been marked for its distinctive sound and diverse roster, drawing praise from critics and audiences alike.

Discotexas' audience is dispersed across the globe and their engagement has contributed to the label's growing recognition worldwide.

Name: Alfreedom
Description:
About Alfreedom (Company Overview)
Alfreedom is the artistic project of Alfredo Herrera, a seasoned singer-songwriter and composer with over 16 years of experience in the music industry. With roots in pop, rock, funk, reggae, and heartfelt ballads, Alfreedom’s music blends authenticity and depth, inspired by global artists like Coldplay, Bruno Mars, Ed Sheeran, Juan Luis Guerra, and Cultura Profética.

Alfreedom’s journey began with standout singles like “Save Me” and “Blow it Away,” which were produced by George Guzman, and continued with notable collaborations with Emilio Estefan and Archie Peña (producer of hits like Shakira’s “Hips Don’t Lie”). A graduate of Berklee College of Music and Miami Dade College in Music Business and Creative Production, Alfredo has played in venues across Miami, Fort Lauderdale, and Caracas, where he leads a talented live band.

Discography & Achievements

Singles: "Flor Cayena" (2020), "Déjame Ir" (2023)
EP: T.B.T. (2022), featuring career highlights like "Save Me" and "Not Giving Up"
Recent Performances: First live show in Venezuela at Modo, Caracas (2024)
Future Ambitions: Aspiring to perform at the renowned Nuevas Bandas Festival (2025)
Mission & Philosophy
At its core, Alfreedom is about spreading love, unity, and peace through music. With emotionally powerful lyrics, captivating arrangements, and unforgettable live performances, Alfreedom offers a universal message: "Love conquers all."

As Alfredo Herrera puts it:
"If we all play the right notes, we can live in harmony."

Live Experience & Engagement
Alfreedom’s live shows are an interactive journey of music, connection, and celebration. Whether through laughter, dance, or heartfelt moments, audiences experience a unique bond with the band, often participating in raffles and on-stage collaborations.

Connect with Us

Instagram: @alfredomusic
TikTok: @alfreedommusic
YouTube: Alfreedom
Spotify: Alfreedom
For bookings or collaborations, contact us at:

Name: The Still Worship Collective
Description:
The Still Worship Collective began during the pandemic of 2020 when two friends began to meet for weekly co-writes over Zoom. During these sessions, Trevor Noonan and Shaun Tomczak shared the way that God was moving in their lives and still inspiring them with wonder and awe in all that He has made. As the lyrics and music developed into congregational worship songs, they couldn’t help but feel like God was calling them to something bigger than just the two of them. As they began to talk through God’s stirring of their hearts they began to ask questions like:

How is God moving through the local church?

Is there a need for a platform where someone called to their local church can still share the music God is inspiring? 

From these questions, the two began to form The Still Worship Collective, a platform to elevate the songs God is still inspiring in the local church.

Name: Otaku Nation Records
Description:
Otaku Nation Records is an independent U.S, Chicago, Illinois based record label that primarily releases "Otaku music," music about and inspired by Japanese Animation and the dedicated subculture behind it known as "Otaku Culture." 

Formed in 2018, and officially in 2021, Karl Terrell Thomas Jr, more known by his stage name, Chaos Network, founded Otaku Nation Records with the mission to bring accurate representation of Anime and Otaku Culture to the world, while also creating music that will inspire and empower Otaku and Anime fans to be proud of their passion. Otaku Nation Records acts as an ambassador for Anime and Otaku Culture and will advocate its legitimacy as a beneficial lifestyle by showcasing and explaining its mediums to the general audience, in the hopes that interested parties will come to understand, appreciate, and engage the culture and its mediums. 

Utilizing the vast amount of inspiration Anime and Otaku Culture gives, Otaku Nation Records creates the highest quality music about and inspired by Anime and Otaku Culture.

Currently, Otaku Nation Records has 1 single and 1 EP released; both by Chaos Network. Otaku Nation Records have a small roster of very talented recording artists with music in the works. 

To learn more, visit:
https://otakunationrecords.com

Name: Sweetwater Studios
Description:
Chuck Surack founded Sweetwater in 1979 in the cramped cabin of a Volkswagen Microbus. Originally a recording company, the mobile studio toured the country with Chuck at the wheel, recording artists and providing other audio services. 

In the early ’80s, Chuck added the Kurzwiel K250 to his growing collection, creating his own sound library that was quickly adopted by chart-topping musicians. Before long, these musicians began approaching Chuck to consult them on their K250 purchases with factory options and Sweetwater-specific upgrades. This evolved into wider instrument and gear sales with a focus on personal interaction and customer support. And over time, the Sweetwater we know today was born. 

As Sweetwater grew, we never lost sight of our roots. From the studio’s beginnings in that humble VW bus, we’ve continued to evolve and grow along with the industry. Today, our studios offer many of the same legendary pieces that would have been in a top studio in 1979 — Neumann microphones, Fairchild compressors, and a large-format console designed by Rupert Neve, to name a few — alongside cutting-edge technology like Dolby Atmos.

Name: Ascension on Wax
Description:
Ascension on Wax is a Berlin-based House Music label focused on collaborating with visual artists and Dance Music producers. Working with contemporary producers who are influenced by the jazzy and soulful sound that flourished in the 90s US east coast scene, AoW’s music is true to the roots of House Music.

Organised by two best friends, the foundations of AoW were the Berlin Ascension Parties starting in 2019, adding more of a Jazz and Soul flavour to Techno-Heavy Berlin.

AoW collaborates with contemporary visual artists and dance music producers to provide certified limited vinyl pressings with beautiful artworks alongside the labels standard DJ Releases.

The name Ascension is a homage to John Coltrane’s ground-breaking 1966 Free-Jazz Ascension album. It honours Jazz’s place in the formation of House Music, and the Jazzy Deep House sound.

With a background in music, I bring a deep understanding of tone, rhythm, and expression to every script, ensuring a natural and professional delivery suitable for brands, institutions, and storytelling-based projects. With hands-on experience in brand management, marketing, publishing, and audio production, I deliver projects that are both strategically sound and creatively effective.

I have collaborated on digital media and content projects, creating effective solutions that combine creativity and precision. My approach emphasizes clarity, nuance, and audience connection, making every project sound polished and authentic.

I record in my acoustic-treated studio using Sennheiser MKH 416 and Rode NT1 Signature Series microphones with Logic Pro, providing high-quality audio for all productions. Organized and detail-oriented, I offer fast turnaround and responsive revisions to meet project needs.

If you’re looking for a Turkish voice that is versatile, expressive, and audience-focused, I would be happy to bring your scripts to life.

Ready when you are — let’s give voice to your story.
